heatsynced.name: Heat Synced
heatsynced.SA1: Gain ENRAGE for 10/12/15 seconds when using a SPECIAL MOVE or BLOCKBUSTER while in STAR POWER mode.
heatsynced.SA2: CHARGE ATTACKS consume all stacks of ENRAGE, inflicting STUN and HEAVY BLEED for 1/1.5/2 second(s) per stack consumed.

darklord.name: Dark Lord
darklord.SA1: Eliza starts the match with permanent FATIGUE. The first time an opponent is defeated while Eliza is alive, FATIGUE is removed, she gains 50/75/100% HEALTH, and she permanently gains increased CRIT RATE and CRIT DAMAGE by 50%.
darklord.SA2: CRITICAL HITS inflict DEATH MARK, QUIETUS, or BLEED and grant ENRAGE for 10/12/15 seconds each.

luckylure.name: Lucky Lure
luckylure.SA1: While Umbrella is alive, the active Fighter has a 30/40/50% chance to gain a BUFF based on a random teammate's ELEMENT for 7 seconds when landing a CRITICAL HIT.
luckylure.SA2: While Umbrella is alive, increase the active Fighter's CRIT DAMAGE by 10/15/20% per stack of REGEN on the Fighter.

grandmother.name: Grand Mother
grandmother.SA1: Successful DASH ATTACKS have a 50/75/100% chance to inflict CURSE for 5 seconds. When a DEBUFF on the opponent expires, inflict 1 random DEBUFF for 5 seconds.
grandmother.SA2: Permanently increase Double's ATTACK and reduce the opponent's DEFENSE by 0.5/0.75/1% each when inflicting a DEBUFF.

apexcomplex.name: Apex Complex
apexcomplex.SA1: While the opponent's HEALTH is above 65/50/35%, DASH ATTACKS inflict CURSE and grant HASTE for 10/12/15 seconds each on HIT.
apexcomplex.SA2: Inflict WITHER for 5 seconds and deal damage equal to 5% of the opponent's MAX HEALTH every 4/3/2 seconds while near the opponent and benefiting from HASTE.

altarego.name: Altar Ego
altarego.SA1: While near an opponent and not BLOCKING, inflict a random DEBUFF for 5/7/10 seconds every 2 seconds.
altarego.SA2: When using a TAUNT, remove all opponent DEBUFFS. For each DEBUFF removed, deal damage equal to 15/20/25% of Double's ATTACK to the opponent. Opponents defeated while TAUNTING cannot be revived.

armedforces.name: Armed Forces
armedforces.SA1: 10% chance when either Fighter is HIT to gain ARMOR and UNFLINCHING for 5/7/10 seconds.
armedforces.SA2: When Cerebella gains a BUFF, 50/75/100% chance to transfer 1 DEBUFF from herself to the opponent.

assassinsgreed.name: Assassin's Greed
assassinsgreed.SA1: When either Fighter uses a BLOCKBUSTER, they lose 15/20/25% of their remaining HEALTH and suffer HEAVY BLEED for 5 seconds.
assassinsgreed.SA2: Gain 3/4/5% HEALTH per second while nearby an opponent suffering BLEED.

bufferzone.name: Buffer Zone
bufferzone.SA1: When Robo-Fortune TAGS IN, remove all opponent BUFFS, inflict HEX and DISABLE TAG INS for 5/7/10 seconds each.
bufferzone.SA2: All BEAM and ENERGY attacks have a 10% chance on hit to grant BARRIER and UNFLINCHING for 5/7/10 seconds each. Also, transfer all active BUFFS to the incoming Fighter when TAGGING from Robo-Fortune.

superluminal.name: Superluminal
superluminal.SA1: While Valentine is alive, the active Fighter's SPECIAL MOVE COOLDOWNS recharge 70/85/100% faster while dashing or back-dashing. Successful DASH ATTACKS instantly refresh TAG INS.
superluminal.SA2: While Valentine is alive, the active Fighter's first SPECIAL MOVE HIT of a combo grants all teammates EVASION and the first BLOCKBUSTER HIT grants all teammates HASTE for 5/6/7 seconds each.

wavewarrior.name: Wave Warrior
wavewarrior.SA1: Every 15th COMBO HIT, transfer up to 2 opponent BUFFS to self and reduce opponent BLOCKBUSTER METER by 15/20/25%.
wavewarrior.SA2: While Annie has living teammates, gaining a BUFF permanently increases DAMAGE by 5/7/10% and heals all teammates for 5% HEALTH.

agelesswonder.name: Ageless Wonder
agelesswonder.SA1: Well-timed BLOCKS grant AUTO-BLOCK, FINAL STAND, and IMMUNITY for 5/7/10 seconds each.
agelesswonder.SA2: Inflict IMMOBILIZE for 10 seconds and gain 3/4/5 stacks of PRECISION when either Fighter blocks a projectile.

bigbaddy.name: Big Baddy
bigbaddy.SA1: While Big Band is alive, opponents deal 15/25/35% less damage with SPECIAL HITS and BLOCKBUSTER HITS.
bigbaddy.SA2: When Big Band successfully lands a DASH ATTACK, drain 5% HEALTH from the enemy. When Big Band is HIT during his DASH ATTACK, he gains 2 stacks of THORNS for 5/7/10 seconds.

brassbandit.name: Brass Bandit
brassbandit.SA1: Remove 1 opponent BUFF, grant ENRAGE for 10 seconds and DRAIN 3% HEALTH every 15/12/10 COMBO HITS.
brassbandit.SA2: Reset the timers of all active BUFFS for every 30/25/20% HEALTH lost by either Fighter.

bloodbath.name: Bloodbath
bloodbath.SA1: If either Fighter uses a BLOCKBUSTER, both fighters are afflicted with BLEED for 5/7/10 seconds.
bloodbath.SA2: 25/50/100% chance to convert all BLEED effects on self into REGEN.

lockedin.name: Locked In
lockedin.SA1: While near a TEAR, 50/75/100% chance for SPECIAL MOVES to grant HASTE for 15 seconds and remove 1 opponent BUFF.
lockedin.SA2: While at least 1 TEAR is on the stage, CRITICAL HITS grant INVINCIBLE for 1 second and 5/7/10% of all CRIT DAMAGE dealt is regained as HEALTH.

bluebomber.name: Blue Bomber
bluebomber.SA1: All BEAM and ENERGY attacks have a 25% chance on HIT to inflict ARMOR BREAK for 10/12/15 seconds.
bluebomber.SA2: Recover 25% HEALTH and gain 3/4/5 stacks of BARRIER when using a TIER 3 BLOCKBUSTER.

beatbox.name: Beat Box
beatbox.SA1: Gain ENRAGE for 3/4/5 seconds after using a SPECIAL MOVE.
beatbox.SA2: Gain 15/20/25% BLOCKBUSTER METER when using a SPECIAL MOVE.

bitingcold.name: Biting Cold
bitingcold.SA1: Gain 1 stack of BARRIER and THORNS for 5/7/10 seconds every 3 seconds while near a dead body.
bitingcold.SA2: Gain 3/4/5 stacks of REGEN for 10 seconds and 50% BLOCKBUSTER METER when defeating an opponent. Defeated opponents cannot be revived.

blooddrive.name: Blood Drive
blooddrive.SA1: 15% chance on HIT to inflict BLEED on yourself and HEAVY BLEED on the opponent for 5/7/10 seconds each.
blooddrive.SA2: When using a SPECIAL MOVE or BLOCKBUSTER, remove all BLEEDS and gain ENRAGE for 5/7/10 seconds per BLEED removed.

bioexorcist.name: Bio-Exorcist
bioexorcist.SA1: While CHARGED and not BLOCKING, DRAIN 1/1.5/2% of a nearby opponent's HEALTH per second.
bioexorcist.SA2: While CHARGED, DRAIN 15/20/25% HEALTH from each living teammate when suffering a HIT that would be fatal.

brainfreeze.name: Brain Freeze
brainfreeze.SA1: ATTACK damage is increased by 1/2/3% of your CURRENT HEALTH.
brainfreeze.SA2: Damage inflicted by the opponent is reduced by 1/2/3% per opponent COMBO HIT.

blitzglamour.name: Blitz & Glamour
blitzglamour.SA1: While on the opponent's side of the stage, Cerebella has a 15% chance on HIT to inflict INVERSE POLARITY and ARMOR BREAK for 5/7/10 seconds each.
blitzglamour.SA2: After 10/7/5 seconds while on her own side of the stage, Cerebella REMOVES all DEBUFFS from herself and gains IMMUNITY and REGEN. These BUFFS are removed when KNOCKED DOWN.

badhairday.name: Bad Hair Day
badhairday.SA1: 10% chance on HIT to inflict BLEED for 3/5/7 seconds.
badhairday.SA2: 10/12/15% increased CRIT RATE while the opponent is suffering BLEED.

biohazard.name: Biohazard
biohazard.SA1: While above 50% HEALTH, gain 6 BUCKSHOTS when reloading with no SHOTS remaining. BUCKSHOTS deal 25/35/50% bonus DAMAGE and remove 1 opponent BUFF on hit.
biohazard.SA2: While below 50% HEALTH, regain 50/75/100% of Black Dahlia's MAX HEALTH when reloading with no SHOTS remaining.

buzzkill.name: Buzzkill
buzzkill.SA1: 10% chance on HIT to inflict HEAVY BLEED for 5/7/10 seconds.
buzzkill.SA2: Gain permanent ENRAGE when an opponent's HEALTH drops below 15/20/25%.

beastking.name: Beast King
beastking.SA1: Inflict WITHER and CURSE for 5/7/10 seconds each when dealing at least 10% of the opponent's MAX HEALTH from a single HIT.
beastking.SA2: Inflict 10/15/25% bonus damage for each DEBUFF stack applied to either Fighter.

bassline.name: Bassline
bassline.SA1: On TAG IN, gain HEAVY REGEN and ARMOR for 5/7/10 seconds.
bassline.SA2: On TAG IN, gain 20/25/35% BLOCKBUSTER METER.

badmsfrosty.name: Bad Ms Frosty
badmsfrosty.SA1: 50% chance on CRITICAL HIT to DISABLE the opponent's BLOCKBUSTERS for 4/5/6 seconds.
badmsfrosty.SA2: Also inflicts ARMOR BREAK for 4/5/6 seconds.

bombshell.name: Bombshell
bombshell.SA1: Gain ENRAGE, BARRIER or REGEN for 10/12/15 seconds when spawning a TEAR.
bombshell.SA2: When DETONATING at least 3 TEARS at once, TEARS are UNBLOCKABLE and Parasoul changes outfits. DETONATING 5 TEARS at once inflicts STUN for 1/1.5/2 seconds on HIT.

bluestreak.name: Blue Streak
bluestreak.SA1: Grant DEADEYE and HASTE while Filia has at least 100/98/95% HEALTH. These BUFFS are removed when Filia's HEALTH drops below 100/98/95%.
bluestreak.SA2: Gain IMMUNITY, FINAL STAND and UNFLINCHING for 5/6/7 seconds each when using a BLOCKBUSTER while benefiting from DEADEYE. Also gain 3 stacks of PRECISION.

bigtop.name: Big Top
bigtop.SA1: Once per match, RESURRECT with 10/25/50% HEALTH when defeated. Also gain INVINCIBLE and UNFLINCHING for 6/7/8 seconds.
bigtop.SA2: When either Fighter is KNOCKED DOWN, remove 1 DEBUFF from self and gain HEAVY REGEN for 6/8/10 seconds.

bloodyvalentine.name: Bloody Valentine
bloodyvalentine.SA1: Regain 5/7/10% HEALTH when either Fighter uses a SPECIAL MOVE.
bloodyvalentine.SA2: Regain 5/10/15% BLOCKBUSTER METER when either Fighter uses a BLOCKBUSTER.

ironmatron.name: Iron Matron
ironmatron.SA1: Detonated TEARS grant 1 stack of ENRAGE for 10/12/15 seconds on HIT.
ironmatron.SA2: DASH ATTACKS are UNBLOCKABLE while benefiting from at least 3 stacks of ENRAGE. Successful DASH ATTACKS grant MIASMA and inflict ARMOR BREAK for 3/4/5 seconds each.

bluescreen.name: Blue Screen
bluescreen.SA1: Gain ARMOR every 10/7/5 seconds. The ARMOR will be removed when KNOCKED DOWN.
bluescreen.SA2: When defeated, instantly detonate and inflict 25/35/50% bonus damage for each stack of ARMOR applied to Robo-Fortune.

phantomwrangler.name: Phantom Wrangler
phantomwrangler.SA1: HITS from SKELETAL SUMMONS deal 30% BONUS DAMAGE and have a 50% chance to inflict SLIME for 10/12/15 seconds.
phantomwrangler.SA2: Using a BLOCKBUSTER inflicts QUIETUS for 10/12/15 seconds if the opponent is suffering from SLIME.

cluechaser.name: Clue Chaser
cluechaser.SA1: While Filia is alive, increase the active Fighter's CRIT RATE by 5/7/10% every 3 COMBO HITS (up to 50/75/100%)
cluechaser.SA2: Filia's critical HITS above 20/15/10 combo hits ignore the opponent Fighter's ARMOR and DEFENSE.

classcutter.name: Class Cutter
classcutter.SA1: All HITS from a BLOCKBUSTER or SPECIAL MOVE have a 10% chance to be UNBLOCKABLE and inflict DEATH MARK for 10/12/15 seconds.
classcutter.SA2: Inflict HEAVY BLEED and HEAL BLOCK for 10 seconds when dealing at least 10/7/5% of the opponent's MAX HEALTH from a single HIT.

crimsoncyclone.name: Crimson Cyclone
crimsoncyclone.SA1: Every 7th COMBO HIT landed on Cerebella or the opponent grants REGEN and ARMOR for 10/13/15 seconds each. While benefiting from REGEN or ARMOR, BLOCKBUSTERS deal 30/40/50% increased damage.
crimsoncyclone.SA2: Gain 10/12/15% BLOCKBUSTER METER and have a 30/40/50% chance to refresh the COOLDOWN of all SPECIAL MOVES when landing a THROW.

chillguy.name: Chill Guy
chillguy.SA1: When blocking a HIT, apply 1 stack of SLOW for 10/13/15 seconds. When the opponent reaches 5 stacks of SLOW, remove all SLOW stacks and inflict STUN for 6 seconds.
chillguy.SA2: When any teammate HITS a stunned opponent, inflict ARMOR BREAK and gain DEADEYE for 5/8/10 seconds each.

creatureofhabit.name: Creature of Habit
creatureofhabit.SA1: If none of Double's BLOCKBUSTERS are fully CHARGED, gain 1 stack of MIASMA for 10 seconds every 7/6/5 seconds while not BLOCKING.
creatureofhabit.SA2: Gain 1 stack of ENRAGE every 4/3/2 seconds while a BLOCKBUSTER is fully charged. ENRAGE is removed when using a BLOCKBUSTER.

criminalmind.name: Criminal Mind
criminalmind.SA1: Inflict DEATH MARK and gain THORNS for 5/7/10 seconds each when either Fighter deals at least 10% MAX HEALTH from a single HIT.
criminalmind.SA2: Opponents are inflicted with BLEED for 3/4/5 seconds when dashing while suffering from DEATH MARK.

curlscout.name: Curl Scout
curlscout.SA1: For every 5th COMBO HIT landed on either fighter, remove 1 DEBUFF and gain ARMOR for 7/8/10 seconds.
curlscout.SA2: While benefiting from ARMOR, gain 1% HEALTH, 1/2/3% BLOCKBUSTER METER per second, and inflict WITHER for 4/5/6 seconds every 4 seconds.

coldstones.name: Cold Stones
coldstones.SA1: THROWS have a 10/15/20% chance to inflict STUN for 6 seconds.
coldstones.SA2: Deal 25/35/50% bonus damage against STUNNED opponents.

chaostheory.name: Chaos Theory
chaostheory.SA1: When TRANSMUTING, inflict BLEED on yourself and gain ENRAGE for 6/8/10 seconds each. Also when TRANSMUTING to the LIGHT element, gain BLESSING.
chaostheory.SA2: DASH ATTACKS remove all BLEEDS. DRAIN 3/4/5% HEALTH per BLEED removed.

candycrusher.name: Candy Crusher
candycrusher.SA1: Gain REGEN every 5/4/3 seconds while OVERSTUFFED. REGEN is removed when KNOCKED DOWN.
candycrusher.SA2: Once per match, gain permanent HASTE when reaching 5/4/3 stacks of REGEN.

claworder.name: Claw & Order
claworder.SA1: CRITICAL HITS have a 25/35/50% chance to reset the timers of all opponent DEBUFFS except STUN and DOOM.
claworder.SA2: HITS that deal at least 10/7/5% of the opponent's MAX HEALTH set their SPECIAL MOVES on cooldown and DISABLE their BLOCKBUSTERS for 10/12/15 seconds.

overclocked.name: Overclocked
overclocked.SA1: Gain PRECISION and BARRIER after every 5/4/3 seconds not suffering a hit (includes blocked hits).
overclocked.SA2: All attacks are UNBLOCKABLE while at 5/4/3 or more stacks of PRECISION, and 50% of incoming damage is reflected while at 5/4/3 or more stacks of BARRIER.

corrosiveagent.name: Corrosive Agent
corrosiveagent.SA1: Remove all DEBUFFS and gain 1/2/3 stack(s) of BARRIER when either Fighter uses a BLOCKBUSTER.
corrosiveagent.SA2: With 5 stacks of BARRIER, all SHOTS are UNBLOCKABLE and inflict SLIME on HIT for 5/7/10 seconds.

crittykitty.name: Critty Kitty
crittykitty.SA1: Either Fighter's CRITICAL HITS inflict BLEED for 5 seconds and CRIPPLE and DEATH MARK for 10 seconds each.
crittykitty.SA2: When either Fighter lands a non-projectile CRITICAL HIT, permanently increase their ATTACK by 2/3/4/5%.
crittykitty.SA3: Ms. Fortune's CRITICAL HITS permanently increase her CRIT DAMAGE by 10% and have a 15/20/25/15% chance to instantly defeat the opponent if they are suffering from DEATH MARK.
crittykitty.SA4: When the opponent lands a NON-CRITICAL HIT, Ms. Fortune gains 3/5% CRIT RESIST until the COMBO ends and the opponent loses 2/3% MAX HEALTH. When Ms. Fortune is KNOCKED DOWN, the active Fighter gains 25% CRIT RATE and 50/75% CRIT DAMAGE for 15 seconds each.
crittykitty.SA5: When the opponent lands a NON-CRITICAL HIT, they suffer POWER SURGE for 10 seconds. The opponent's non-projectile HITS deal 15% more damage for each BUFF or DEBUFF applied to either Fighter.

demonartist.name: Demon Artist
demonartist.SA1: While CHARGED, inflict BLEED for 5/7/10 seconds for every 15% HEALTH lost by either Fighter.
demonartist.SA2: Gain ENRAGE and REGEN for 8/10/12 seconds each when using a BLOCKBUSTER while the opponent is suffering from BLEED.

dreamband.name: Dream Band
dreamband.SA1: MIRROR 1 opponent BUFF and reset its timer every 20/15/10 COMBO HITS.
dreamband.SA2: When either Fighter is KNOCKED DOWN, reset the timers of all active BUFFS and gain IMMUNITY for 5/7/8 seconds.

dragonbrawler.name: Dragon Brawler
dragonbrawler.SA1: Gain 3/4/5 stacks of PRECISION when activating HYPE, and gain 100% increased CRIT DAMAGE while in HYPE MODE.
dragonbrawler.SA2: Gain 2 stacks of ENRAGE and 25/35/50% BLOCKBUSTER METER when defeating an opponent while in HYPE MODE.

dealbreaker.name: Deal Breaker
dealbreaker.SA1: Grant IMMUNITY, HASTE or ENRAGE for 10/12/15 seconds when either Fighter uses a BLOCKBUSTER. Also inflict GUARD BREAK and 2 random DEBUFFS for 10 seconds each.
dealbreaker.SA2: 50% chance to grant UNFLINCHING, REGEN or ENRAGE for 10/12/15 seconds when a BUFF or DEBUFF on the opponent expires.

dreamcatcher.name: Dream Catcher
dreamcatcher.SA1: SPECIAL MOVES and TAG INS have a 25% chance on HIT to STUN the opponent for 4/5/6 seconds (does not affect Dark Fighters).
dreamcatcher.SA2: Every 3/2/1 second(s) while facing a STUNNED opponent, Peacock gains 1 stack of PRECISION, and her teammates gain 5% BLOCKBUSTER METER, and 5% HEALTH.

decrypted.name: Decrypted
decrypted.SA1: Inflict 15/20/25% bonus damage for each of the opponent's living teammates.
decrypted.SA2: Transfer 1 enemy BUFF to yourself and inflict WITHER for 5/7/10 seconds when entering SEKHMET MODE.

dreamdemon.name: Dream Demon
dreamdemon.SA1: Inflict permanent DEATH MARK and gain ENRAGE every 25/20/15 seconds while facing the same opponent. ENRAGE is removed when TAGGING OUT.
dreamdemon.SA2: 50/75/100% chance for Fukua's DASH ATTACKS to be UNBLOCKABLE if the opponent is suffering from DEATH MARK.

doubleexposure.name: Double Exposure
doubleexposure.SA1: Successful BEAM attacks of SPECIAL MOVES grant IMMUNITY for 5/7/10 seconds and STUN the opponent for 2 seconds if they are not suffering from BLEED.
doubleexposure.SA2: When STUN expires on the opponent, grant EVASION for 10/12/15 seconds to Robo-Fortune and inflict HEAVY BLEED for 5 seconds on the opponent.

deadheat.name: Dead Heat
deadheat.SA1: Gain 2 stacks of ENRAGE for 5 seconds every 10 seconds while below 25/35/50% HEALTH.
deadheat.SA2: 50/75/100% chance for SPECIAL MOVES to be UNBLOCKABLE while benefiting from ENRAGE.

divaintervention.name: Diva Intervention
divaintervention.SA1: While in Sekhmet Mode, 25/35/50% of the damage inflicted by NON-BLOCKBUSTER attacks is regained as HEALTH.
divaintervention.SA2: While in Sekhmet Mode, NON-BLOCKBUSTER attacks deal 50/75/100% bonus damage and drain 4/6/8% of the opponent's BLOCKBUSTER METER.

doublicious.name: Doublicious
doublicious.SA1: 10/15/25% chance on HIT to TRANSFER 1 BUFF from the opponent to yourself.
doublicious.SA2: 10/15/25% chance when HIT to TRANSFER 1 DEBUFF from yourself to the opponent.

lockednloaded.name: Locked 'N' Loaded
lockednloaded.SA1: When FIRING a SHOT, sacrifice 3% of Black Dahlia's MAX HEALTH to inflict WITHER and gain 5/7/8% BLOCKBUSTER METER.
lockednloaded.SA2: When using a BLOCKBUSTER, DRAIN 3/4/5% of the opponent's MAX HEALTH per stack of WITHER and convert all stacks of WITHER on the opponent to INVERSE POLARITY for 3 seconds per stack.

dreadlocks.name: Dread Locks
dreadlocks.SA1: When HIT, reflect 15/25/35% of the incoming damage.
dreadlocks.SA2: Inflict HEAVY BLEED for 5/7/10 seconds when the opponent lands a CRITICAL HIT.

darkmight.name: Dark Might
darkmight.SA1: When a teammate is defeated while Beowulf is alive, remove all opponent BUFFS. Also inflict 1/2/3 stacks of permanent POWER SURGE and permanent CURSE.
darkmight.SA2: While the opponent is suffering from CURSE, SPECIAL MOVE and BLOCKBUSTER HITS have a 50/75/100% chance to be UNBLOCKABLE and grant UNFLINCHING for 5/7/10 seconds.

noblemogul.name: Noble Mogul
noblemogul.SA1: While Eliza is alive, all teammates gain BARRIER every 30/25/20 seconds.
noblemogul.SA2: While Eliza is alive, all LIGHT teammates deal 5/10/15% bonus damage for each stack of BARRIER applied to them. Also Eliza gains IMMUNITY while benefiting from BARRIER.

deadofwinter.name: Dead of Winter
deadofwinter.SA1: RESURRECT with 25% HEALTH and 5 stacks of ARMOR after being dead for 60/45/30 seconds. A stack of ARMOR is removed after every HIT suffered.
deadofwinter.SA2: Deal 50/75/100% bonus damage while benefiting from ARMOR.

dangerprone.name: Danger-Prone
dangerprone.SA1: Back-dashing grants HASTE and inflicts ARMOR BREAK on the opponent for 5/7/10 seconds each.
dangerprone.SA2: While benefiting from HASTE, both Fighters gain 50/75/100% increased CRIT DAMAGE

dameslayer.name: Dame Slayer
dameslayer.SA1: Once per match when RELOADING with no SHOTS remaining, gain 6 LIGHTNING SHOTS and inflict DOOM for 30/25/20 seconds. DOOM is removed if Black Dahlia TAGS OUT or is defeated.
dameslayer.SA2: LIGHTNING SHOTS deal 100% bonus damage and cause the opponent to lose 5/10/15% BLOCKBUSTER METER on HIT (also applies on blocked hits).

djinnfrizz.name: Djinn Frizz
djinnfrizz.SA1: Every 15/12/10 seconds gain 3 random BUFF(S) for 5 seconds.
djinnfrizz.SA2: 33% chance when using a BLOCKBUSTER to convert 1/2/3 BUFF(S) into permanent ENRAGE.

fearedfaux.name: Feared Faux
fearedfaux.SA1: While Fukua's Shadow Clone is active, SPECIAL HITS inflict CURSE for 5/7/10 seconds.
fearedfaux.SA2: While Fukua's Shadow Clone is active, SPECIAL MOVE HITS deal 60/80/100% bonus DAMAGE.

evergreenevil.name: Evergreen Evil
evergreenevil.SA1: 5/7/10% chance when HIT while not at an ELEMENTAL DISADVANTAGE to gain REGEN and THORNS for 5 seconds, and to remove all DEBUFFS.
evergreenevil.SA2: When Double or any teammate gains a BUFF, its duration is increased by 3/4/5 seconds and Double gains 5% BLOCKBUSTER METER.

epicsax.name: Epic Sax
epicsax.SA1: Deal 1/2/3% bonus damage per COMBO HIT.
epicsax.SA2: Gain a random BUFF every 20/15/10 COMBO HITS for 8 seconds.

eagerdeceiver.name: Eager Deceiver
eagerdeceiver.SA1: Well-timed BLOCKS have a 50/75/100% chance to grant 1 stack each of EVASION, BARRIER, and BLESSING.
eagerdeceiver.SA2: 50% chance when using a BLOCKBUSTER while RAVENOUS to convert 1/2/3 BUFF(S) into permanent ENRAGE. Gain permanent PRECISION while benefiting from 5 stacks of this ENRAGE.

doomsayer.name: Doomsayer
doomsayer.SA1: HITS landed on Eliza deal 4% increased damage per current COMBO HIT.
doomsayer.SA2: When the opponent tags in with a Fire, Light, or Neutral Fighter, they gain 3 stacks of REGEN and have UNBLOCKABLE attacks for 10 seconds each, and inflict ARMOR BREAK on Eliza for 10 seconds. Tagging in with a Water, Dark, or Air Fighter grants Eliza ARMOR and inflicts 1/2/3 stack(s) of BLEED for 15 seconds each.
doomsayer.SA3: Every 30 seconds facing the same fighter, Eliza removes all debuffs and gains INVINCIBILITY and permanent ENRAGE. Successful hits against ELIZA while she has INVINCIBILITY deal 10/15/20% MAX HEALTH damage to the attacker. INVINCIBILITY is removed when the opponent TAGS OUT.
doomsayer.SA4: When Eliza KNOCKS DOWN an enemy, apply permanent DOOM for 6/4 seconds. DOOM is removed when Eliza is hit with a SPECIAL MOVE or BLOCKBUSTER (including blocked HITS).
doomsayer.SA5: If Eliza goes 15 seconds without suffering a DEBUFF, she applies 2 random permanent DEBUFFS to the opponent, bypassing any prevention effects.

fortunecookie.name: Fortune Cookie
fortunecookie.SA1: Every 10 seconds while facing the same opponent, Ms. Fortune suffers CURSE for 20/15/10 seconds, but gains permanent PRECISION, bypassing all BUFF and DEBUFF prevention effects.
fortunecookie.SA2: When CURSE is applied to Ms. Fortune, gain 1 stack of EVASION and HASTE for 10/20/30 seconds each, bypassing all BUFF prevention effects.

frayedends.name: Frayed Ends
frayedends.SA1: 20% chance when HIT to inflict BLEED for 3/5/7 seconds.
frayedends.SA2: Deal 25/35/50% bonus damage against an opponent suffering BLEED.

finalfang.name: Final Fang
finalfang.SA1: When the opponent gains a BUFF, MIRROR 1 of their BUFFS and inflict CURSE for 5/6/7 seconds.
finalfang.SA2: 10/15/20% chance on HIT to inflict a random DEBUFF for 15 seconds while the opponent is suffering from a DEBUFF.

fanfavorite.name: Fan Favorite
fanfavorite.SA1: While Beowulf is alive, all teammates gain FINAL STAND and UNFLINCHING for 5/7/10 seconds each every 20 seconds.
fanfavorite.SA2: Inflict DEATH MARK and gain 2 stacks of ENRAGE for 5/7/10 seconds each when activating HYPE MODE while Beowulf has living teammates.

freedomfighter.name: Freedom Fighter
freedomfighter.SA1: 10% chance to inflict ARMOR BREAK and gain AUTO-BLOCK for 5/7/10 seconds each when either fighter is HIT (includes Blocking).
freedomfighter.SA2: When BLOCKING a BLOCKBUSTER or SPECIAL MOVE attack, DISABLE opponent BLOCKBUSTERS for 10/12/15 seconds and inflict STUN for 4 seconds.

firefly.name: Firefly
firefly.SA1: When BLOCKING while below 50% HEALTH, gain 5/6/8% HEALTH per second.
firefly.SA2: Also gain 5/6/8% BLOCKBUSTER METER per second.

freezeframe.name: Freeze Frame
freezeframe.SA1: Projectiles have a 25/35/50% chance on HIT to inflict SLOW and WITHER for 15 seconds. Both effects are removed if the opponent uses a BLOCKBUSTER.
freezeframe.SA2: When SLOW or WITHER expires, the opponent suffers damage equal to 25/35/50% of Peacock's ATTACK and is STUNNED for 3 seconds.

fatalfray.name: Fatal Fray
fatalfray.SA1: When either Fighter lands a BLOCKED HIT, suffer a random DEBUFF for 5/7/10 seconds and permanently decrease the opponent's ATTACK and DEFENSE by 4%.
fatalfray.SA2: When either Fighter uses a SPECIAL MOVE, transfer all DEBUFFS to the opponent and gain EVASION for 5 seconds and IMMUNITY for 5/7/10 seconds. If a DEBUFF was transferred, heal for 2% MAX HEALTH for each DEBUFF on the opponent.

freakyfriday.name: Freaky Friday
freakyfriday.SA1: CRITICAL HITS inflict BLEED and DEATH MARK for 3/4/5 seconds each.
freakyfriday.SA2: Gain HASTE for 10 seconds and 3/4/5 stacks of PRECISION when defeating an opponent with a single HIT that deals at least 10% HEALTH.

furryfury.name: Furry Fury
furryfury.SA1: 10/15/20% chance on HIT to inflict BLEED and gain ENRAGE for 5/7/10 seconds each while Ms. Fortune's health percentage is higher than her opponent's.
furryfury.SA2: Remove 1 BUFF from a nearby opponent every 3/2/1 second(s) while at 3 or more stacks of ENRAGE.

spellbent.name: Spell-Bent
spellbent.SA1: SKELETAL SUMMON MOVES grant either REGEN for 10/12/15 seconds or BARRIER.
spellbent.SA2: While benefiting from REGEN and BARRIER, HITS from SKELETAL SUMMONS deal an additional 1/1.5/2% of the opponent's MAX HEALTH and DRAIN 3% BLOCKBUSTER METER.

glacialghoul.name: Glacial Ghoul
glacialghoul.SA1: Gain BARRIER when gaining a DRAGON CHARGE. Also using your last DRAGON CHARGE converts all stacks of BARRIER into 5/7/10% HEALTH each.
glacialghoul.SA2: While CHARGED and benefiting from BARRIER, gain permanent ENRAGE after every 10/8/6 seconds and permanent IMMUNITY after every 12 seconds. Both BUFFS are removed when the opponent is defeated.

footsoldier.name: Foot Soldier
footsoldier.SA1: HEAD HITS have a 50/75/100% chance to grant DEADEYE and 1 random BUFF for 7 seconds each. Also remove 1 DEBUFF from self.
footsoldier.SA2: Deal 5/7/10% bonus damage for each BUFF applied to either Fighter.

flytrap.name: Fly Trap
flytrap.SA1: Permanently increase Painwheel's ATTACK by 25% for every 25/20/15% HEALTH lost by any Fighter. While Painwheel is the active Fighter, benched teammates also heal for 15/20/25% HEALTH.
flytrap.SA2: Gain 1/2/3 stacks of permanent REGEN when defeating an opponent. Gain MIASMA for 3/6/9 seconds every 3 seconds while benefiting from REGEN.

featherededges.name: Feathered Edges
featherededges.SA1: A well-timed BLOCK grants 1/2/3 stacks of BARRIER, and DISABLES opponent BLOCKBUSTERS and TAG INS for 10 seconds.
featherededges.SA2: While Fukua is benefiting from BARRIER she does not react to opponent projectile hits, and 100/150/200% of projectile damage is reflected back.

freshheir.name: Fresh Heir
freshheir.SA1: DASH ATTACKS have a 50/75/100% chance on HIT to DISABLE opponent BLOCKBUSTERS for 10 seconds.
freshheir.SA2: Gain 25/35/50% BLOCKBUSTER METER when defeating an opponent whose BLOCKBUSTERS are DISABLED.

tidaltraveler.name: Tidal Traveler
tidaltraveler.SA1: Puddle HITS grant IMMUNITY for 10/12/15 seconds.
tidaltraveler.SA2: While benefiting from IMMUNITY, BUBBLE attacks deal 25/35/50% bonus damage. Also DISABLE BLOCKBUSTERS and inflict ARMOR BREAK for 15 seconds each (also applies on blocked hits).

furmidable.name: Furmidable
furmidable.SA1: CHARGE ATTACK HITS grant IMMUNITY for 5/7/10 seconds and 5 stacks of PRECISION.
furmidable.SA2: While benefiting from IMMUNITY, SPECIAL MOVE HITS are UNBLOCKABLE. While benefiting from PRECISION, they inflict INVERSE POLARITY for 5/7/10 seconds.

furmonger.name: Fur Monger
furmonger.SA1: 50/75/100% chance to gain ENRAGE, THORNS or REGEN when FIRING a SHOT. These BUFFS are removed when KNOCKED DOWN.
furmonger.SA2: All SHOTS deal 5/10/15% bonus damage for each BUFF applied to Black Dahlia.

gravedanger.name: Grave Danger
gravedanger.SA1: When using a BLOCKBUSTER while CHARGED, convert all DEBUFFS into 10% BLOCKBUSTER METER per DEBUFF and gain HEAVY REGEN for 10/12/15 seconds.
gravedanger.SA2: While on the opponent's side of the stage, gain DEADEYE and inflict QUIETUS for 10/12/15 seconds each when using a BLOCKBUSTER.

gravedigger.name: Gravedigger
gravedigger.SA1: Gain IMMUNITY and UNFLINCHING for 10/12/15 seconds each when the opponent is KNOCKED DOWN.
gravedigger.SA2: Gain PRECISION every 4/3/2 seconds while benefiting from IMMUNITY or UNFLINCHING.

grimfan.name: Grim Fan
grimfan.SA1: Once per match, gain UNFLINCHING and IMMUNITY for 15 seconds when dropping below 25/35/50% HEALTH.
grimfan.SA2: When Painwheel's UNFLINCHING expires, RESURRECT teammates with 20/25/30% HEALTH .

gijazz.name: G.I. Jazz
gijazz.SA1: Once per match, gain 3/4/5 stacks of REGEN and 3 stacks of ARMOR for 10 seconds each when falling below 25% HEALTH.
gijazz.SA2: While HEALTH is greater than 75/65/50%, gain 1 stack(s) of permanent ARMOR.

graymatter.name: Gray Matter
graymatter.SA1: All teammates start the match with 15/20/25% BLOCKBUSTER METER.
graymatter.SA2: Once per match while Cerebella is alive, all teammates gain 25/35/50% BLOCKBUSTER METER when dropping below 25% HEALTH.

grinreaper.name: Grin Reaper
grinreaper.SA1: Regain 15% BLOCKBUSTER METER and inflict INVERSE POLARITY for 10/12/15 seconds when either Fighter uses a BLOCKBUSTER.
grinreaper.SA2: Gain a MORTUARY CHARGE and 2 stacks of MIASMA for 8/10/12 seconds when defeating an opponent.

graveyardshift.name: Graveyard Shift
graveyardshift.SA1: Valentine and all teammates gain HEAVY REGEN for 10/12/15 seconds when any Fighter is defeated.
graveyardshift.SA2: 15% chance on HIT to inflict CURSE and HEAL BLOCK for 5/7/10 seconds when benefiting from REGEN.

galacticglamour.name: Galactic Glamour
galacticglamour.SA1: 25/35/50% chance on CRITICAL HIT to inflict GUARD BREAK for 10 seconds.
galacticglamour.SA2: 25/35/50% chance when suffering a CRITICAL HIT to gain AUTO-BLOCK for 10 seconds.

ganggreen.name: Gang Green
ganggreen.SA1: Squigly gains BLOCKBUSTER METER equal to 1/2/3% of her MOVE SPEED.
ganggreen.SA2: Gain 1 stack of MIASMA for 5 seconds every 3/2/1 second(s) while not BLOCKING near a dead body.

tombgloom.name: Tomb & Gloom
tombgloom.SA1: Inflict WITHER, CURSE, QUIETUS, or HEX for 5/7/10 seconds when using a BLOCKBUSTER or SPECIAL MOVE.
tombgloom.SA2: Also gain 1 stack of EVASION for 5/7/10 seconds when using a BLOCKBUSTER.

undyingwarrior.name: Undying Warrior
undyingwarrior.SA1: Opponent BLOCKBUSTERS deal 40/80/120/160/200% bonus damage to Marie.
undyingwarrior.SA2: When either Fighter lands a BLOCKBUSTER HIT, inflict DISABLE BLOCKBUSTERS for 10 seconds and grant ENRAGE for 10 seconds.
undyingwarrior.SA3: When the opponent uses a SPECIAL MOVE, Marie gains permanent ARMOR. When Marie gains 3 or more stacks of ARMOR, she inflicts HEX on the opponent for 10/15/20 seconds and gains 100% BLOCKBUSTER METER. ARMOR is removed at the end of the opponent's COMBO.
undyingwarrior.SA4: If the opponent blocks for longer than 1 second without blocking a hit, Marie gains UNBLOCKABLE for 5 seconds.
undyingwarrior.SA5: Marie is immune to CURSE. After Marie uses a BLOCKBUSTER, she gains UNFLINCHING for 10/15 seconds. UNFLINCHING is removed when hit with a BLOCKBUSTER or THROW.

goldengunner.name: Golden Gunner
goldengunner.SA1: Gain 3/4/5 stack(s) of PRECISION when RELOADING with no SHOTS remaining.
goldengunner.SA2: With at least 3 stacks of PRECISION, all SHOTS are UNBLOCKABLE and deal 50/75/100% bonus damage.

stonesentinel.name: Stone Sentinel
stonesentinel.SA1: While on Cerebella's side of the stage, gain 40/50/60% damage reduction.
stonesentinel.SA2: While on the opponent's side of the stage, the active Fighter gains 1 stack of BARRIER for 10 seconds every 10/7/5 seconds.

hairapparent.name: Hair Apparent
hairapparent.SA1: Using a SPECIAL MOVE grants HASTE for 10/12/15 seconds.
hairapparent.SA2: 50/75/100% chance to refresh the COOLDOWN of all SPECIAL MOVES when using a BLOCKBUSTER.

hellsbelle.name: Hell's Belle
hellsbelle.SA1: While the opponent's HEALTH is above 35%, 10/12/15% chance on HIT to inflict BLEED for 5 seconds and a random DEBUFF.
hellsbelle.SA2: Every 10 seconds as the active Fighter, Fukua grants her teammates MIASMA for 10/12/15 seconds and EVASION.

hexcaliber.name: Hex Caliber
hexcaliber.SA1: Every 10th COMBO HIT landed on Black Dahlia or the opponent grants UNFLINCHING for 5/7/10 seconds. Also gain permanent PRECISION while benefiting from this UNFLINCHING.
hexcaliber.SA2: ALL SHOTS are UNBLOCKABLE and grant IMMUNITY for 5/7/10 seconds while benefiting from PRECISION.

hellcat.name: Hellcat
hellcat.SA1: Gain ENRAGE after every 12/10/8 seconds while above 50% HEALTH. ENRAGE is removed when dropping below 50% HEALTH.
hellcat.SA2: Gain 3/4/5 stacks of PRECISION when defeating an opponent while benefiting from ENRAGE.

heartofdarkness.name: Heart of Darkness
heartofdarkness.SA1: Once per match when TRANSMUTING to the opponent's element, permanently copy their Signature Ability, remove all their BUFFS and inflict HEX for 20/25/30 seconds.
heartofdarkness.SA2: When defeating an opponent suffering from a DEBUFF, gain 3 stacks of MIASMA and inflict 3 random DEBUFFS on the next opponent for 10/15/20 seconds each.

hallowfiend.name: Hallow Fiend
hallowfiend.SA1: While none of Valentine's BLOCKBUSTERS are fully charged, NON-BLOCKBUSTER HITS drain 3/4/5% BLOCKBUSTER METER.
hallowfiend.SA2: If none of the opponent's BLOCKBUSTERS are fully charged, BLOCKBUSTER HITS inflict HEX for 4/5/6 seconds.

heavyhanded.name: Heavy Handed
heavyhanded.SA1: Gain ENRAGE and PRECISION every 0.3/0.2/0.1 seconds while charging a CHARGE ATTACK. Gain UNFLINCHING for 10 seconds when reaching 5 stacks of ENRAGE. ENRAGES will be removed when Cerebella is HIT.
heavyhanded.SA2: Regain 10% MAX HEALTH and remove 1/2/3 opponent BUFFS when dealing at least 10% of the opponent's MAX HEALTH from a single HIT.

hypeman.name: Hype Man
hypeman.SA1: While in HYPE MODE, DRAIN opponent BLOCKBUSTER METER by 5/7/10% per landed HIT.
hypeman.SA2: When activating HYPE MODE, teammates in reserve gain 25/35/50% BLOCKBUSTER METER.

heavymetal.name: Heavy Metal
heavymetal.SA1: 10/12/15% chance to gain ARMOR for 5 seconds when either Fighter is HIT with a close-range attack (includes Blocking).
heavymetal.SA2: While benefiting from ARMOR, BLOCKBUSTERS deal 50/75/100% bonus damage.

harlequin.name: Harlequin
harlequin.SA1: SPECIAL MOVES deal 10/15/20% bonus damage for all teammates.
harlequin.SA2: COOLDOWN for SPECIAL MOVES is reduced by 25/30/35% for all teammates.

heavyreign.name: Heavy Reign
heavyreign.SA1: 50% chance on CRITICAL HIT to gain 10/12/15% BLOCKBUSTER METER.
heavyreign.SA2: 50% chance to gain 10/12/15% BLOCKBUSTER METER when suffering a CRITICAL HIT.

highruler.name: High Ruler
highruler.SA1: Opponents have their BLOCKBUSTERS and TAG-INS DISABLED after 3/2/1 second(s) while near a TEAR.
highruler.SA2: Detonated TEARS inflict CURSE and HEX for 5/7/10 seconds on HIT. Dark Fighters also suffer FATIGUE for 5 seconds.

headstrong.name: Headstrong
headstrong.SA1: THROWS have a 50% chance to inflict CRIPPLE for 4/5/7 seconds.
headstrong.SA2: Also inflict ARMOR BREAK for 4/5/7 seconds.

firebranded.name: Fire Branded
firebranded.SA1: Gain ENRAGE for 10/12/15 seconds and remove 1 opponent BUFF when using a SPECIAL MOVE or BLOCKBUSTER.
firebranded.SA2: While in STAR POWER mode, CHARGE ATTACKS consume all stacks of ENRAGE, inflicting STUN, HEX, and CURSE for 1/1.5/2 second(s) per stack consumed.

timelesshero.name: Timeless Hero
timelesshero.SA1: Gain ENRAGE, AUTO-BLOCK, or REGEN every 30/25/20 COMBO HITS. These BUFFS are removed when suffering a HIT.
timelesshero.SA2: Once per match when obtaining all of the above BUFFS, gain 50/75/100% BLOCKBUSTER METER and infinite STAR POWER.

indomitable.name: Indomitable
indomitable.SA1: Grant DEADEYE and inflict HEAL BLOCK when the opponent's HEALTH drops below 60/70/80%. Both effects are removed if Parasoul is KNOCKED DOWN.
indomitable.SA2: Transfer 1 opponent BUFF and gain MIASMA for 7 seconds every 5/4/3 seconds while on the opponent's side of the stage and benefiting from DEADEYE.

immoralfiber.name: Immoral Fiber
immoralfiber.SA1: When defeated, deal damage equivalent to 25/35/50% of your MAX HEALTH.
immoralfiber.SA2: When defeated, heal all teammates by 25/35/50% of your MAX HEALTH.

icyhot.name: Icy Hot
icyhot.SA1: All teammates TAG IN with REGEN for 10/12/15 seconds.
icyhot.SA2: On TAG IN, all teammates gain 10/12/15% BLOCKBUSTER METER.

ivyleague.name: Ivy League
ivyleague.SA1: Inflict SLOW for 5/7/10 seconds when spawning a TEAR.
ivyleague.SA2: On TEAR DETONATION, inflicts WITHER for 5/7/10 seconds per active TEAR.

innerpieces.name: Inner Pieces
innerpieces.SA1: When entering Sekhmet Mode, gain a BUFF for 10/12/15 seconds per teammate. The BUFF gained is determined by each teammate's ELEMENT.
innerpieces.SA2: 50/75/100% chance when TAGGING to or from Eliza for all active BUFFS to transfer to the incoming Fighter.

idolthreat.name: Idol Threat
idolthreat.SA1: EVADING an attack grants FINAL STAND and ARMOR for 5/7/10 seconds.
idolthreat.SA2: Inflict ARMOR BREAK for 5 seconds when HITTING an attacking opponent. Additionally, 100/150/200% of the damage dealt is regained as HEALTH.

infernaltwin.name: Infernal Twin
infernaltwin.SA1: When hitting an attacking opponent, gain ENRAGE for 10/12/15 seconds and refresh the duration of all ENRAGES.
infernaltwin.SA2: When HIT while benefiting from 5/4/3 stacks of ENRAGE, inflict FATIGUE for 5 seconds.

indenile.name: In Denile
indenile.SA1: Inflict ARMOR BREAK for 5/10/15 seconds when entering Sekhmet Mode.
indenile.SA2: Remove all DEBUFFS and gain IMMUNITY for 5/10/15 seconds when entering Sekhmet Mode.

inkling.name: Inkling
inkling.SA1: Deal 15/20/25% bonus damage for each living teammate.
inkling.SA2: SPECIAL MOVES have a 15/20/25% chance to be UNBLOCKABLE while Peacock has living teammates.

ionicicon.name: Ionic Icon
ionicicon.SA1: All teammates' TAG IN attacks inflict DEATH MARK for 10/15/20 seconds and STUN the opponent for 4 seconds. Peacock also gains 1/2/3 stack(s) of BARRIER.
ionicicon.SA2: Every 15 COMBO HITS by a Light Element teammate removes 1 opponent BUFF and inflicts POWER SURGE for 10/12/15 seconds.

jawbreaker.name: Jawbreaker
jawbreaker.SA1: When TRANSMUTING, gain a random BUFF for 5/6/7 seconds.
jawbreaker.SA2: Deal 10/15/20% bonus damage for each BUFF applied to Double.

justkitten.name: Just Kitten
justkitten.SA1: 25/35/50% chance when suffering a DEBUFF to immediately convert that DEBUFF to a stack of PRECISION.
justkitten.SA2: 5/10/15% chance on any non-projectile HIT to gain 1 stack of EVASION and HASTE for 10 seconds.

jackospecter.name: Jack-O-Specter
jackospecter.SA1: Gain a random BUFF for 10/12/15 seconds when either Fighter uses a SPECIAL MOVE.
jackospecter.SA2: Inflict 3 random DEBUFFS on the opponent for 10/12/15 seconds each when either Fighter uses a BLOCKBUSTER.

killjoy.name: Kill Joy
killjoy.SA1: Teammates gain permanent REGEN when first dropping below 25/35/50% HEALTH while at an ELEMENTAL ADVANTAGE.
killjoy.SA2: Once per match on DEATH, RESURRECT all defeated teammates with 15/20/25% HEALTH.

lasthope.name: Last Hope
lasthope.SA1: While Valentine is alive, any teammate is defeated, RESURRECT that teammate with 15/20/25% HEALTH. This effect only occurs once per Fighter.
lasthope.SA2: Also grant HEAVY REGEN for 5/10/15 seconds.

lapisluxury.name: Lapis Luxury
lapisluxury.SA1: Once per match when TAGGING IN, match the meter value of the opponent's highest BLOCKBUSTER METER and inflict ARMOR BREAK for 10/12/15 seconds.
lapisluxury.SA2: Once per match when using a TIER 3 BLOCKBUSTER, switch HEALTH percentages with the opponent and gain HEAVY REGEN for 10/12/15 seconds.

darkhorse.name: Dark Horse
darkhorse.SA1: Inflict CURSE and gain permanent HASTE after facing the same opponent for 15/12/10 seconds.
darkhorse.SA2: While Marie is alive and benefiting from HASTE, all Dark teammates deal 25/35/50% BONUS DAMAGE.

lethalweapon.name: Lethal Weapon
lethalweapon.SA1: All SHOTS have a 50/75/100% chance on HIT to inflict BLEED for 10 seconds.
lethalweapon.SA2: Gain 1/2/3% METER and 1% HEALTH per second while nearby an opponent suffering BLEED.

angelmaker.name: Angel Maker
angelmaker.SA1: When TAGGING from Umbrella, the incoming Fighter gains 3 stacks of ENRAGE, 3 stacks of MIASMA, and IMMUNITY for 15/18/20 seconds each at the cost of up to 35/30/25% of Umbrella's MAX HEALTH.
angelmaker.SA2: When Umbrella TAGS IN, gain 3 stacks of EVASION, 2 stacks of REGEN, and IMMUNITY for 10/12/15 seconds each and DRAIN 25/30/35% BLOCKBUSTER METER from the opponent.

lovecrafted.name: Love Crafted
lovecrafted.SA1: While near an opponent, DISABLE BLOCKBUSTERS and inflict HEAL BLOCK after 3/2/1 second(s).
lovecrafted.SA2: Every 10th COMBO HIT will land as a CRITICAL HIT, and will inflict DEATH MARK and HEAVY BLEED for 10/12/15 seconds.

felinelucky.name: Feline Lucky
felinelucky.SA1: Gain 1/2/3 stack(s) of PRECISION every 7 seconds.
felinelucky.SA2: 2% chance when either Fighter lands a CRITICAL HIT to gain IMMUNE, INVINCIBLE, FINAL STAND, and UNFLINCHING for 10/12/15 seconds.

m3ow.name: M-3OW
m3ow.SA1: Deal 50/75/100% bonus damage while Robo-Fortune is far away from the opponent.
m3ow.SA2: Gain INVINCIBLE for 3/4/5 seconds after 3 seconds while far away from the opponent.

octoplasm.name: Octoplasm
octoplasm.SA1: When TAGGING to or from Marie, teammates gain 2 stacks of REGEN for 15 seconds and 10/12/15% BLOCKBUSTER METER.
octoplasm.SA2: While Marie is alive, WATER teammates' hits have a 15/20/25% chance to inflict BLEED, SLIME, or QUIETUS for 15 seconds each while benefiting from REGEN.

magicurl.name: Magicurl
magicurl.SA1: When the active Fighter is about to suffer a DEBUFF, Filia sacrifices 10% MAX HP to give the active Fighter IMMUNITY for 3/4/5 seconds. This effect can only trigger once every 10 seconds.
magicurl.SA2: Also deal 10% MAX HEALTH damage to the opponent and inflict HEAL BLOCK for 5 seconds. Filia's BLOCKBUSTER or SPECIAL HITS have a 25/30/35% chance of healing her for 10% MAX HEALTH.

mummydearest.name: Mummy Dearest
mummydearest.SA1: Using a SPECIAL MOVE sacrifices 10% of Eliza's MAX HEALTH to gain 15/25/35% BLOCKBUSTER METER and HEAVY REGEN for 10 seconds.
mummydearest.SA2: Gain BLESSING and IMMUNITY for 20/25/30 seconds each when entering SEKHMET MODE.

materiagirl.name: Materia Girl
materiagirl.SA1: 20% chance to gain 5/7/10% STAR POWER meter when either Fighter is HIT (includes Blocking).
materiagirl.SA2: While in STAR POWER MODE, gain permanent PRECISION, DEADEYE, or HASTE and 3/4/5% BLOCKBUSTER METER per second. The permanent BUFF is removed when exiting STAR POWER.

madmalice.name: Mad Malice
madmalice.SA1: While Marie is alive, her teammates' CRITICAL HITS have a 15/20/25% chance to grant ENRAGE for 10/13/15 seconds.
madmalice.SA2: Marie gains permanent ENRAGE for every 50/40/30% HEALTH lost by any teammate or opponent. Gain permanent PRECISION while benefiting from 5 stacks of this ENRAGE.

mystmatch.name: Myst-Match
mystmatch.SA1: While sharing the opponent's same element, gain a 50/75/100% chance to MIRROR all of an opponent's BUFFS any time the opponent gains a BUFF.
mystmatch.SA2: Gain 1/2/3 stack(s) of PRECISION when a BUFF expires.

maskedmenace.name: Masked Menace
maskedmenace.SA1: While near an opponent, inflict CURSE and QUIETUS for 2 seconds after every 3/2/1 second(s).
maskedmenace.SA2: While the opponent is suffering from QUIETUS, landing a BURST inflicts permanent DOOM for 25/20/15 seconds and heals 15% HEALTH. DOOM is removed when the opponent gains a BUFF or Painwheel dies.

missmercury.name: Miss Mercury
missmercury.SA1: 9/11/13% chance on HIT to gain 13% STAR POWER and inflict QUIETUS for 13 seconds.
missmercury.SA2: When activating STAR POWER, instantly empty it to convert 1/2/3 BUFFS on the opponent to random DEBUFFS for 13 seconds. Also inflict CURSE for 13 seconds when activated at full meter.

maidofhonor.name: Maid of Honor
maidofhonor.SA1: While Marie is alive, HITS blocked by all teammates have a 25/35/50% chance to convert 1 DEBUFF into a stack of BARRIER.
maidofhonor.SA2: While Marie is alive, all teammates recover 1/1.5/2% HEALTH per second while benefiting from BARRIER.

meanone.name: Mean One
meanone.SA1: Gain ENRAGE for 10/12/15 seconds for every BUFF gained by the opponent.
meanone.SA2: Projectiles have a 25/35/50% chance on HIT to convert 1 opponent BUFF into a random DEBUFF.

megasonic.name: Megasonic
megasonic.SA1: When blocking a HIT, reduce damage taken by 25/50/75%, and gain ENRAGE and THORNS for 10 seconds. One ENRAGE stack is removed every 10th COMBO HIT.
megasonic.SA2: While benefiting from ENRAGE, 25/35/50% of the damage dealt is regained as HEALTH.

mstrial.name: Ms. Trial
mstrial.SA1: When HITTING an attacking opponent, remove 1 of the opponent's BUFFS and gain 3/4/5 stack(s) of PRECISION.
mstrial.SA2: PRECISION HITS have a 50/75/100% chance to ignore the opponent's DEFENSE and ARMOR.

martialoutlaw.name: Martial Outlaw
martialoutlaw.SA1: Any teammate's CHARGE ATTACK HITS grant HASTE for 8/10/12 seconds.
martialoutlaw.SA2: All teammates have a 15/20/25% chance on HIT to inflict ARMOR BREAK and HEAVY BLEED for 10 seconds each while benefiting from HASTE.

mekastar.name: Mekastar
mekastar.SA1: If none of Cerebella's BLOCKBUSTERS are fully charged, gain ENRAGE for 5/7/10 seconds and 5% BLOCKBUSTER METER every 3 seconds while not BLOCKING.
mekastar.SA2: Gain BARRIER and inflict CURSE for 15 seconds each when using a BLOCKBUSTER. Also while benefiting from ENRAGE, 3% chance on HIT to instantly defeat the opponent if they have less than 30/40/50% HEALTH.

meowfurever.name: Meow & Furever
meowfurever.SA1: Gain FINAL STAND for 10 seconds and 3/4/5 stacks of PRECISION for every 10% HEALTH LOST.
meowfurever.SA2: The opponent suffers DEATH MARK for 10/12/15 seconds and STUN for 4 seconds when FINAL STAND expires.

headhunter.name: Head Hunter
headhunter.SA1: Gain 1 stack of PRECISION every 1.5/1/0.5 seconds while BLOCKING and not being hit.
headhunter.SA2: With at least 3 stacks of PRECISION, all BEAM and ENERGY attacks are UNBLOCKABLE and inflict POWER SURGE for 10/12/15 seconds.

barebones.name: Bare Bones
barebones.SA1: Gain THORNS for 8/10/12 seconds when using a SPECIAL MOVE.
barebones.SA2: When reaching 3 stacks of THORNS, remove all THORNS and gain MIASMA for 10/12/15 seconds.

modelleader.name: Model Leader
modelleader.SA1: While Annie is alive, she clears the active Fighter's DEBUFFS and grants ARMOR for 15 seconds every 30/25/20 seconds. Water teammates also gain 2 stacks of ENRAGE for 15 seconds.
modelleader.SA2: Gain permanent AUTO-BLOCK for each 25/20/15% HEALTH lost. All Teammates benefiting from ARMOR or AUTO-BLOCK gain 4/5/6% BLOCKBUSTER METER when using a SPECIAL MOVE.

moonstruck.name: Moonstruck
moonstruck.SA1: Inflict WITHER for 10 seconds and gain 10/12/15% STAR POWER meter when landing a CRITICAL HIT with a projectile.
moonstruck.SA2: Once per match when activating STAR POWER at full meter, REVIVE and HEAL teammates by 50/75/100% of Annie's missing HEALTH.

numbercruncher.name: Number Cruncher
numbercruncher.SA1: 25/35/50% chance to gain 1 stack of BLESSING for 20 seconds every 5 COMBO HITS.
numbercruncher.SA2: When reaching 5 stacks of BLESSING, remove all BLESSINGS and inflict 5 stacks of GUARD BREAK for 5/7/10 seconds.

neardeath.name: Near Death
neardeath.SA1: Transfer 1 DEBUFF from yourself to the opponent and inflict GUARD BREAK for 15 seconds after every 7/6/5 seconds while not suffering a HIT (including blocked HITS).
neardeath.SA2: While the opponent is suffering from a DEBUFF, grant DEADEYE for 10/12/15 seconds when using a BLOCKBUSTER. Also while the opponent has 3 or more stacks of GUARD BREAK, BLOCKBUSTERS deal 50/75/100% bonus damage.

nearlydeparted.name: Nearly Departed
nearlydeparted.SA1: When using a BLOCKBUSTER at an ODD COMBO COUNT, gain INVINCIBLE for 5/6/8 seconds.
nearlydeparted.SA2: Also RESURRECT teammates with 15/20/25% HEALTH if Squigly is below 50% HEALTH.

noegrets.name: No Egrets
noegrets.SA1: On CRITICAL HIT, DISABLE the opponent's BLOCKBUSTERS for 2/3/4 seconds.
noegrets.SA2: Also DISABLES opponent's SPECIAL MOVES and TAG INS for 2/3/4 seconds.

neuromancer.name: Neuromancer
neuromancer.SA1: Drain 5/7/10% BLOCKBUSTER METER for each non-BLOCKBUSTER HIT blocked by the opponent.
neuromancer.SA2: 10/12/15% of damage dealt from a BLOCKBUSTER is also suffered by the opponent's teammates.

numberone.name: Number One
numberone.SA1: Gain DEADEYE and HASTE for 10/12/15 seconds each when activating HYPE MODE.
numberone.SA2: 15/20/25% chance on HIT to gain ENRAGE for 15 seconds while benefiting from HASTE.

nunsense.name: Nunsense
nunsense.SA1: When at an ELEMENTAL ADVANTAGE, gain 1/2/3 random BUFFS for 10 seconds any time the opponent gains a BUFF.
nunsense.SA2: When at an ELEMENTAL ADVANTAGE, inflict 1/2/3 random DEBUFFS for 10 seconds after suffering any DEBUFF.

nightshade.name: Nightshade
nightshade.SA1: Gain DEADEYE for 4/5/6 seconds whenever the opponent suffers a DEBUFF.
nightshade.SA2: Sekhmet hits deal 50/75/100% bonus damage. Opponents defeated by Sekhmet hits cannot be revived.

nightterror.name: Night Terror
nightterror.SA1: Gain 2 stacks of MIASMA for 10 seconds every 4/3/2 seconds while far away from the opponent.
nightterror.SA2: Inflict IMMOBILIZE and FATIGUE for 10 seconds each every 4/3/2 seconds while near the opponent.

necrobreaker.name: Necrobreaker
necrobreaker.SA1: Once per match when suffering a HIT that would be fatal, gain FINAL STAND for 5/10/15 seconds.
necrobreaker.SA2: Gain 5/6/7% HEALTH per second while charging WYRM'S TAIL.

ninjastar.name: Ninja Star
ninjastar.SA1: 50/75/100% chance when hitting an attacking opponent to remove 1 opponent BUFF and inflict GUARD BREAK for 10 seconds.
ninjastar.SA2: Projectiles deal 25/35/50% bonus damage for each DEBUFF stack applied to the opponent.

nyanotech.name: Nyanotech
nyanotech.SA1: Gain BARRIER for 5/7/10 seconds when launching a HEADRONE.
nyanotech.SA2: While benefiting from BARRIER, gain a 50/75/100% chance when suffering a DEBUFF to immediately convert that DEBUFF to ENRAGE.

ogreachiever.name: Ogre Achiever
ogreachiever.SA1: When the opponent attempts to gain a BUFF, Beowulf has a 25/35/50% chance to prevent it and gain IMMUNITY for 10/12/15 seconds.
ogreachiever.SA2: While in HYPE MODE, BLOCKBUSTERS have a 50/75/100% chance to grant permanent ENRAGE and heal for 10% HEALTH.

ohmai.name: Oh Mai
ohmai.SA1: Gain 2 stacks of ENRAGE for 15/17/20 seconds and 5 stacks of PRECISION after defeating an opponent.
ohmai.SA2: When any Fighter is defeated, all teammates gain 2 stacks of ENRAGE for 7/10/15 seconds.

oneup.name: One Up
oneup.SA1: For every 8 COMBO HITS landed, gain DEADEYE for 5/7/10 seconds and BARRIER.
oneup.SA2: When reaching 8, 16, 32 and 64 COMBO HITS, reduce the opponent's CURRENT HEALTH and BLOCKBUSTER METER by 0.5/0.75/1% for each current COMBO HIT.

personaassistant.name: Persona Assistant
personaassistant.SA1: Every 20 seconds while Robo-Fortune is alive, she gains 3/4/5 stacks of PRECISION and 3/4/5 stacks of ENRAGE for 5 seconds. Her teammates also gain 1 stack of BLESSING and BARRIER.
personaassistant.SA2: 50/75/100% chance for DASH ATTACKS to be UNBLOCKABLE while benefiting from ENRAGE.

pickleballer.name: Pickle Baller
pickleballer.SA1: While Beowulf is alive, the active Fighter gains EVASION for 7 seconds and 3/4/5% BLOCKBUSTER METER when the opponent is KNOCKED DOWN.
pickleballer.SA2: When any teammate EVADES an attack, grant REGEN for 6/8/10 seconds and 2 stacks of PRECISION.

purrfectdark.name: Purrfect Dark
purrfectdark.SA1: After facing Ms. Fortune for 15/12/10 seconds, the opponent suffers DEATH MARK and CURSE.
purrfectdark.SA2: HEAD HITS have a 10% chance to instantly defeat opponents if they are suffering from DEATH MARK and are below 25/35/50% HEALTH.

privatedick.name: Private Dick
privatedick.SA1: 5% chance on HIT to STUN the opponent for 2/2.5/3 seconds. Also, BLOCKBUSTERS deal 50% BONUS DAMAGE against opponents suffering from STUN.
privatedick.SA2: When Big Band is about to suffer a DEBUFF, he has a 25/35/50% chance to prevent it and gain ENRAGE for 8 seconds.

donpassione.name: Don Passione
donpassione.SA1: When Eliza is about to suffer a DEBUFF, 50% chance to prevent it and inflict either BLEED, HEX or QUIETUS for 8/10/12 seconds.
donpassione.SA2: Gain permanent MIASMA for each DEBUFF an opponent has when exiting Sekhmet Mode (max 1/2/3 per exit). MIASMA is removed when the opponent is no longer suffering a DEBUFF.

psykid.name: Psykid
psykid.SA1: When HITTING an attacking opponent, gain DEADEYE and inflict INVERSE POLARITY for 10/12/15 seconds each.
psykid.SA2: 50/75/100% chance to reset the timers of all Umbrella's BUFFS and all opponent DEBUFFS except STUN and DOOM when the opponent BOUNCES off a wall.

prismplumage.name: Prism Plumage
prismplumage.SA1: While Peacock is alive, all teammates TAG IN with 2 BUFFS based on their ELEMENTS for 5/7/10 seconds (except after teammate death).
prismplumage.SA2: While Peacock is alive, all projectiles have a 10% chance to inflict DEBUFFS based on the opponent's ELEMENT for 5/7/10 seconds.

palaceplunderer.name: Palace Plunderer
palaceplunderer.SA1: Gain EVASION for 7 seconds and grant all teammates 1/2/3% HEALTH every 5 seconds while not suffering a HIT (includes blocked hits).
palaceplunderer.SA2: Every 15/12/10 COMBO HITS while benefiting from a BUFF, transfer 1 opponent BUFF to self and grant teammates ENRAGE for 30 seconds.

princesspride.name: Princess Pride
princesspride.SA1: Gain REGEN for 4/5/6 seconds and BARRIER when spawning a TEAR.
princesspride.SA2: On TEAR DETONATION, consume all stacks of BARRIER and immediately recover 2/4/6% HEALTH per active TEAR. The detonated TEARS also deal 20% bonus damage per stack consumed.

primalprodigy.name: Primal Prodigy
primalprodigy.SA1: Gain 1 random BUFF for 10 seconds and 5% BLOCKBUSTER METER every 6/5/4 seconds while not suffering a HIT (includes blocked hits).
primalprodigy.SA2: When a BUFF on Peacock expires, inflict CURSE and DISABLE opponent SPECIAL MOVES for 6/7/8 seconds each.

peashooter.name: Pea Shooter
peashooter.SA1: Projectiles deal 15/25/35% bonus damage for all teammates.
peashooter.SA2: All projectiles have a 10/15% chance to inflict ARMOR BREAK for 3/6 seconds.

pyrotechnique.name: Pyro-Technique
pyrotechnique.SA1: BLOCKBUSTER and SPECIAL MOVE HITS have a 20% chance to inflict WITHER and BLEED for 5/7/10 seconds.
pyrotechnique.SA2: 20% chance on HIT to gain ENRAGE for 5/7/10 seconds if the opponent is suffering from WITHER or BLEED.

phantomthreads.name: Phantom Threads
phantomthreads.SA1: When the opponent is KNOCKED DOWN, Fukua gains BLESSING for 10/15/20 seconds and removes 1 opponent BUFF.
phantomthreads.SA2: When using a BLOCKBUSTER, remove all BLESSINGS and gain ENRAGE for 10 seconds and heal for 5/7/10% HEALTH per BLESSING removed.

plottwisted.name: Plot Twisted
plottwisted.SA1: Once per match, RESURRECT with 25/35/50% HEALTH. Also gain 5 random DEBUFFS for 10 seconds and 5 stacks of THORNS for 20 seconds.
plottwisted.SA2: Deal 25/35/50% bonus damage for each active DEBUFF stack applied to Squigly.

prototype.name: Prototype
prototype.SA1: BLOCKBUSTER HITS have a 15/20/25% chance to inflict POWER SURGE for 10 seconds.
prototype.SA2: When using a BLOCKBUSTER, gain 15/20/25% BLOCKBUSTER METER.

patchedup.name: Patched Up
patchedup.SA1: 8/12/15% chance when either Fighter is HIT (includes blocked hits) to transfer 1 opponent BUFF to Ms. Fortune.
patchedup.SA2: While benefiting from at least 3 stacks of any BUFFs, HITS (including blocked hits) inflict WITHER and CURSE for 4/7/10 seconds each.

parasiteweave.name: Parasite Weave
parasiteweave.SA1: 50% chance on CRITICAL HIT to inflict SLOW for 10 seconds and STUN for 2/2.5/3 seconds if the opponent is not already suffering SLOW.
parasiteweave.SA2: 5/10/15% chance on HIT to inflict BLEED for 5 seconds if the opponent is STUNNED.

gustbuster.name: Gust Buster
gustbuster.SA1: HITS from SKELETAL SUMMONS deal 15/25/35% BONUS DAMAGE and TRANSFER up to 3 opponent BUFF(s) to self.
gustbuster.SA2: While CHARGED, CHARGE ATTACK HITS convert all BUFFS and DEBUFFS on self into BARRIER, MIASMA or ENRAGE for 15/25/35 seconds.

poltergust.name: Poltergust
poltergust.SA1: BLOCKBUSTERS deal 50/75/100% bonus damage to opponents with a fully charged BLOCKBUSTER.
poltergust.SA2: When a BUFF on Squigly or the opponent expires, gain 15/20/25% BLOCKBUSTER METER.

primed.name: Primed
primed.SA1: Gain ENRAGE for 5/7/10 seconds when spawning a TEAR.
primed.SA2: Detonated TEARS inflict BLEED for 3/4/5 seconds on HIT.

psycommander.name: Psycommander
psycommander.SA1: When FIRING your last remaining SHOT, gain FINAL STAND and 3/4/5 stacks of ENRAGE for 10 seconds each.
psycommander.SA2: Gain DEADEYE and 1/2/3 stack(s) of EVASION for 10 seconds each when using a SPECIAL MOVE while benefiting from ENRAGE.

puddlepirate.name: Puddle Pirate
puddlepirate.SA1: Opponents lose 1 BUFF every 4/3/2 seconds while near a PUDDLE.
puddlepirate.SA2: While not RAVENOUS, Umbrella gains 3/4/5% HEALTH whenever an opponent loses a BUFF.

shadowpuppet.name: Shadow Puppet
shadowpuppet.SA1: 3/4/5% chance on HIT to reset the timers of all Fukua's BUFFS and all opponent DEBUFFS.
shadowpuppet.SA2: Once per match when suffering a HIT that would be fatal, freeze time for 7 seconds and gain 3/4/5 stacks of MIASMA for 7 seconds. Time resumes if Fukua attacks.

purrminator.name: Purrminator
purrminator.SA1: 10/12/15% chance to gain 1 stack of PRECISION and inflict DEATH MARK for 10 seconds when the opponent BLOCKS a HIT.
purrminator.SA2: Each CRITICAL HIT landed permanently increases DAMAGE by 1/2/3%.

rageappropriate.name: Rage Appropriate
rageappropriate.SA1: Gain permanent ENRAGE when suffering a HIT (including blocked hits) that deals more than 10/7/5% MAX HEALTH.
rageappropriate.SA2: Every 15/12/10th COMBO HIT grants HEAVY REGEN and 2 stacks of ARMOR for 10 seconds each.

rainbowblight.name: Rainbow Blight
rainbowblight.SA1: When TRANSMUTING, gain BUFFS based on the resulting ELEMENT for 7/8/10 seconds.
rainbowblight.SA2: When TRANSMUTING, inflict DEBUFFS based on the resulting ELEMENT for 7/8/10 seconds.

regallyblonde.name: Regally Blonde
regallyblonde.SA1: 50% chance to inflict CRIPPLE and reduce the opponent's BLOCKBUSTER METER by 25/35/50% when either Fighter uses a BLOCKBUSTER.
regallyblonde.SA2: While near an opponent, DISABLE their SPECIAL MOVES and gain AUTO-BLOCK every 4/3/2 seconds. Both effects are removed when no longer near an opponent.

robocopy.name: Robocopy
robocopy.SA1: Once per match when suffering a HIT that would be fatal, gain 1/2/3 stacks of ARMOR and BARRIER. ARMOR lasts for 10 seconds.
robocopy.SA2: When defeating an opponent, gain 2 stacks of ENRAGE for 30 seconds and 25/35/50% BLOCKBUSTER METER.

roughcopy.name: Rough Copy
roughcopy.SA1: Any teammate gains permanent HASTE after facing an opponent with the same ELEMENT for 10/7/5 seconds.
roughcopy.SA2: Any teammate inflicts permanent SLOW after facing an opponent of the same CHARACTER TYPE for 10/7/5 seconds.

resonantevil.name: Resonant Evil
resonantevil.SA1: Getting HIT has a 10% chance to grant ARMOR for 5/7/10 seconds.
resonantevil.SA2: 5% chance when HIT to STUN the opponent for 2/3/4 seconds while benefiting from ARMOR.

cosmicrebel.name: Cosmic Rebel
cosmicrebel.SA1: The 10th non-projectile COMBO HIT inflicts DEATH MARK for 10/12/15 seconds and FATIGUE for 25/20/15 seconds.
cosmicrebel.SA2: CRITICAL HITS grant IMMUNITY for 3/4/5 seconds, INVINCIBLE for 1 second and 25% increased CRIT DAMAGE while near an opponent suffering from DEATH MARK.

riskyginger.name: Risky Ginger
riskyginger.SA1: Inflict DEATH MARK for 10/12/15 seconds and gain ENRAGE when HITTING an attacking opponent. A stack of ENRAGE is removed after each BLOCKED HIT.
riskyginger.SA2: With at least 5/4/3 stacks of ENRAGE, BLOCKBUSTERS become UNBLOCKABLE.

rawnerv.name: Raw Nerv
rawnerv.SA1: Gain FINAL STAND for 15 seconds and inflict permanent DEATHMARK when your HEALTH drops below 25/35/50% HEALTH.
rawnerv.SA2: While benefiting from FINAL STAND, 5/7/10% chance on HIT to gain ENRAGE and 50% of all damage inflicted is regained as HEALTH.

rockstar.name: Rock Star
rockstar.SA1: While Filia is alive, teammates TAG IN with 1/2/3 stack(s) of BARRIER for 10 seconds.
rockstar.SA2: When any teammate's BARRIER expires, they gain FINAL STAND for 10 seconds and 10/15/20% BLOCKBUSTER METER.

redvelvet.name: Red Velvet
redvelvet.SA1: Inflict HEX for 10/12/15 seconds when entering Sekhmet Mode, disabling opponent SIGNATURE ABILITIES for the duration of the effect.
redvelvet.SA2: If an opponent TAGS OUT while suffering from HEX, the next opponent will be inflicted with 3 random DEBUFFS for 10/12/15 seconds.

rainshadow.name: Rain Shadow
rainshadow.SA1: 15% chance when landing a BLOCKED HIT to inflict ARMOR BREAK and POWER SURGE for 10/12/15 seconds each.
rainshadow.SA2: After 5 seconds while on Fukua's side of the stage and while not STUNNED, opponents lose all current BUFFS and suffer FATIGUE for 15/13/10 seconds.

reimaged.name: Reimaged
reimaged.SA1: The 1st COMBO HIT landed on Robo-Fortune converts 1 opponent BUFF into a random DEBUFF and grants ARMOR for 5/7/10 seconds each.
reimaged.SA2: When defeated or DETONATING, reduce the opponent's BLOCKBUSTER METER by 100%. Also once per match, RESURRECT with 15/20/25% HEALTH and gain permanent REGEN and ENRAGE.

rainingchamp.name: Raining Champ
rainingchamp.SA1: While Umbrella is alive, the active Fighter gains 1 stack of BLESSING and UNFLINCHING for 15 seconds every 20/15/10 COMBO HITS.
rainingchamp.SA2: While Umbrella is alive, increase all teammates' ATTACK by 2/3/4% of the Fighter's CURRENT HEALTH for each stack of BLESSING currently on the Fighter.

rerun.name: Rerun
rerun.SA1: All teammates TAG IN with ENRAGE for 10/12/15 seconds.
rerun.SA2: COOLDOWN for TAG INS is reduced by 25/35/50% for all teammates.

rhythmrider.name: Rhythm Rider
rhythmrider.SA1: While Big Band is alive, all teammates gain HASTE and REGEN for 6/8/10 seconds after every 15 seconds.
rhythmrider.SA2: While benefiting from HASTE and REGEN, DASH ATTACKS inflict CURSE. Also when Big Band or any teammate gains a BUFF while the opponent is suffering from CURSE, its duration is increased by 3/4/5 seconds.

rogueagent.name: Rogue Agent
rogueagent.SA1: Each HEAD HIT has a 25% chance to TRANSFER 1 opponent BUFF and convert it into 1/2/3 stack(s) of PRECISION.
rogueagent.SA2: PRECISION HITS grant EVASION and inflict DEATH MARK for 5/7/10 seconds. Each stack of EVASION is removed after an evaded HIT.

rosetinted.name: Rose-Tinted
rosetinted.SA1: While Umbrella is alive, all teammates gain 1 stack each of BARRIER and THORNS for 5/7/10 seconds for every 25% HEALTH lost.
rosetinted.SA2: While Umbrella is alive, she clears all teammate DEBUFFS every 30/25/20 seconds.

rusty.name: Rusty
rusty.SA1: 5/7/10% chance on HIT to inflict BLEED for 3 seconds.
rusty.SA2: Also converts 1/2/3 of the opponent's BUFFS into BLEED.

sawedapart.name: Sawed Apart
sawedapart.SA1: SPECIAL MOVE and BLOCKBUSTER HITS have a 25/30/35% chance to inflict a random DEBUFF for 10 seconds. These debuffs are removed if Painwheel is knocked down.
sawedapart.SA2: While Painwheel is the active Fighter, when a DEBUFF on the opponent expires, deal damage equal to 1/2/3% of their MAX HEALTH.

snakebite.name: Snake Bite
snakebite.SA1: Gain 1/2/3 stacks of EVASION and 25% BLOCKBUSTER METER when activating HYPE MODE.
snakebite.SA2: Gain permanent HASTE and 3/4/5 stacks of BARRIER when defeating an opponent while in HYPE MODE.

soulbound.name: Soulbound
soulbound.SA1: While not in STAR POWER and not benefiting from EVASION, well-timed BLOCKS grant 30/40/50% STAR POWER meter, 1/2/3 stack(s) of BARRIER and allows Annie to EVADE all attacks for 3 seconds.
soulbound.SA2: When activating STAR POWER, sacrifice 35% of MAX HEALTH to gain DEADEYE for 10/12/15 seconds. While in STAR POWER, BENCHED opponents suffer HEX and ALL opponents lose 1/2/3% HEALTH every second.

snakecharmer.name: Snake Charmer
snakecharmer.SA1: While at least 80/65/50% CHARGED, using a SPECIAL MOVE inflicts IMMOBILIZE and DISABLE BLOCKBUSTERS for 10 seconds each.
snakecharmer.SA2: When using a MORTUARY CHARGE, all teammates gain 25/35/50% BLOCKBUSTER METER and permanent ENRAGE.

starcrossed.name: Star-Crossed
starcrossed.SA1: Well-timed BLOCKS STUN the opponent for 3/4/5 seconds and inflict GUARD BREAK. GUARD BREAK is removed when Parasoul TAGS OUT.
starcrossed.SA2: BLOCKBUSTERS deal 0% bonus damage against opponents suffering from GUARD BREAK.

shearforce.name: Shear Force
shearforce.SA1: When either Fighter suffers a DEBUFF, gain 10% BLOCKBUSTER METER and gain BLESSING and AUTO-BLOCK for 10/12/15 seconds each.
shearforce.SA2: When using a BLOCKBUSTER, inflict QUIETUS for 15 seconds and deal 10/12/15% bonus damage per BUFF applied to Filia. Also opponents defeated by BLOCKBUSTERS cannot be revived.

stagefright.name: Stage Fright
stagefright.SA1: The opponent suffers CURSE and HEX for 10/12/15 seconds when dropping below 25% HEALTH.
stagefright.SA2: Inflict a 30/25/20 second DOOM when defeated with a BLOCKBUSTER.

surgeongeneral.name: Surgeon General
surgeongeneral.SA1: While Valentine is alive, she gains a permanent ENRAGE every 60/45/30 seconds.
surgeongeneral.SA2: While Valentine is alive, teammates gain IMMUNITY and HEAVY REGEN for 10/12/15 seconds every 30 seconds.

scaregiver.name: Scare Giver
scaregiver.SA1: Inflict WITHER and grant HASTE for 6/7/8 seconds each when the opponent is KNOCKED DOWN.
scaregiver.SA2: 15/20/25% chance on HIT to grant ENRAGE for 10 seconds and to DRAIN 3/4/5% HEALTH from the opponent while benefiting from HASTE.

stellarhuntress.name: Stellar Huntress
stellarhuntress.SA1: When RELOADING with 3 SHOTS or less remaining, gain 3 LIGHTNING SHOTS. LIGHTNING SHOTS DISABLE TAG INS and have a 10% chance to DISABLE BLOCKBUSTERS for 10/12/15 seconds each.
stellarhuntress.SA2: While the opponent is suffering from DISABLE TAG IN, LIGHTNING SHOTS deal 0.5/1/1.5% MAX HEALTH as bonus damage to the opponent's teammates. While the opponent is suffering from DISABLE BLOCKBUSTERS, deal an additional 0.5/1/1.5% MAX HEALTH to all opponents.

splittingimage.name: Splitting Image
splittingimage.SA1: While HEALTH% is lower than the opponent's, gain permanent IMMUNITY and recover 1/1.5/2% HEALTH per second.
splittingimage.SA2: Gain 5% BLOCKBUSTER METER and 1 stack of PRECISION after every 5/4/3 seconds while facing a Fukua, Filia, or a Light Element opponent.

silentkill.name: Silent Kill
silentkill.SA1: 15/20/25% chance on HIT to REMOVE all DEBUFFS from self.
silentkill.SA2: 15/20/25% chance on HIT to REMOVE all opponent BUFFS.

shadowops.name: Shadow Ops
shadowops.SA1: Opponents suffer CURSE after 3/2/1 seconds while near a TEAR.
shadowops.SA2: Gain THORNS every 3/2/1 seconds while near a TEAR.

standout.name: Stand Out
standout.SA1: 50/60/75% of all damage inflicted is regained as HEALTH as long as Eliza's health percentage is lower than her opponent's (also applies on Blocked hits).
standout.SA2: When the opponent attempts to gain a BUFF, Eliza has a 25/35/50% chance to prevent it and gain 25% BLOCKBUSTER METER.

starlightrose.name: Starlight Rose
starlightrose.SA1: While Annie is alive, all teammates' well-timed BLOCKS remove up to 2 DEBUFF(S) and grant BARRIER for 10/12/15 seconds.
starlightrose.SA2: While Annie is alive, all teammates gain ENRAGE and REGEN for 5/6/7 seconds each every 3 seconds while benefiting from BARRIER.

summersalt.name: Summer Salt
summersalt.SA1: Opponents lose 1 BUFF and 1/2/3% HEALTH every 2 seconds while near a TEAR.
summersalt.SA2: When DETONATING at least 3 TEARS at once, REMOVE all DEBUFFS and gain 3/4/5 stacks of PRECISION. The detonated TEARS also deal 100% bonus damage.

sundaeschool.name: Sundae School
sundaeschool.SA1: When any teammate inflicts a DEBUFF (excluding STUN), increase its duration by 1/2/3 second(s).
sundaeschool.SA2: When any teammate suffers a DEBUFF (excluding STUN), reduce its duration by 1/2/3 second(s).

heartless.name: Heartless
heartless.SA1: HITS from SKELETAL SUMMONS deal 25/35/50% BONUS DAMAGE. These HITS are UNBLOCKABLE when the opponent is below 50% HEALTH or suffering from at least 3 DEBUFFS.
heartless.SA2: While Marie is alive, the last surviving opponent TAGS IN with HEX, HEAVY BLEED and QUIETUS for 10/15/20 seconds each.

megalomaniac.name: Megalomaniac
megalomaniac.SA1: While Marie is alive, she gains permanent ARMOR and EVASION for 10 seconds for every 40/35/30% HEALTH lost by any teammate. 1 stack of ARMOR is removed when her opponent uses a BLOCKBUSTER.
megalomaniac.SA2: While Marie is the active Fighter and has at least 3 stacks of ARMOR, she inflicts STUN for 2/3/4 seconds every 15 seconds and DRAINS 10% BLOCKBUSTER METER every 5 seconds.

starshine.name: Star Shine
starshine.SA1: Gain a random BUFF for 8/10/12 seconds every 4 seconds. Also, gain 8/9/10% STAR POWER for each BUFF gained by either fighter while not in STAR POWER MODE.
starshine.SA2: Remove all DEBUFFS and gain IMMUNITY for 5/7/10 seconds and permanent PRECISION when activating STAR POWER MODE at full meter. Permanent PRECISION is removed when an opponent is defeated.

serpentsin.name: Serpent Sin
serpentsin.SA1: SPECIAL MOVE HITS heal for 5/7/10% of Double's MAX HEALTH.
serpentsin.SA2: Gain MIASMA for 3/4/5 seconds when the opponent gains a BUFF or suffers a DEBUFF while Double's HEALTH is higher than the opponent's.

seraphsoldier.name: Seraph Soldier
seraphsoldier.SA1: While Valentine is alive, the active Fighter gains ENRAGE for 10 seconds when dealing at least 10% of the opponent's MAX HEALTH from a single HIT. Also, your active Fire Element Fighter permanently increases DAMAGE by 0.25/0.35/0.5% every second.
seraphsoldier.SA2: While Valentine is alive, 15/20/25% of all damage inflicted by the active Fighter's CRITICAL HITS is regained as HEALTH while that Fighter is benefiting from ENRAGE.

starspangled.name: Star-Spangled
starspangled.SA1: Gain BARRIER and inflict GUARD BREAK for 10/12/15 seconds each when breaking or landing a THROW.
starspangled.SA2: While benefiting from BARRIER and the opponent is in the air, 15/20/25% chance on HIT to inflict BLEED and FATIGUE for 7 seconds each.

scaredstiff.name: Scared Stiff
scaredstiff.SA1: Gain UNFLINCHING after facing the same opponent for 25/20/15 seconds. UNFLINCHING is removed when the opponent TAGS OUT or dies.
scaredstiff.SA2: Cannot suffer more than 15/10/5% of your MAX HEALTH from a single HIT.

scarletviper.name: Scarlet Viper
scarletviper.SA1: Inflict BLEED for 10/12/15 seconds on both Fighters when entering Sekhmet Mode.
scarletviper.SA2: Gain ENRAGE for 10/12/15 seconds when suffering a DEBUFF.

seawitch.name: Sea Witch
seawitch.SA1: Using a BLOCKBUSTER inflicts CURSE and GUARD BREAK for 6/8/10 seconds each.
seawitch.SA2: Using a SPECIAL MOVE grants HASTE and DEADEYE for 6/8/10 seconds each.

salty.name: Salty
salty.SA1: Once per match, gain BLESSING and 3 stacks of ENRAGE for 5/7/10 seconds when falling below 35% HEALTH.
salty.SA2: While benefiting from ENRAGE, THROWS have a 50% chance to inflict BLEED for 5/7/10 seconds.

scrub.name: Scrub
scrub.SA1: All teammates instantly recover 5/10/15% HEALTH when Valentine TAGS OUT.
scrub.SA2: Teammates in reserve regenerate SCRATCH DAMAGE and gain BLOCKBUSTER METER 50/75/100% faster.

sheltered.name: Sheltered
sheltered.SA1: Increases CRIT RATE by 10/15/20% for all teammates.
sheltered.SA2: On CRITICAL HIT, gain ENRAGE for 5/6/7 seconds.

thrillshrieker.name: Thrill Shrieker
thrillshrieker.SA1: 50/75/100% chance to gain ENRAGE when gaining a DRAGON CHARGE. Each ENRAGE is removed when a charge is spent.
thrillshrieker.SA2: The opponent suffers damage equal to 25/35/50% of their current HEALTH when TAGGING OUT while Squigly has ENRAGE.

sketchy.name: Sketchy
sketchy.SA1: While Peacock is alive, all teammates TAG IN with HASTE and IMMUNITY for 5/7/10 seconds (except after teammate death).
sketchy.SA2: While Peacock is alive, all opponents TAG IN with SLOW and CURSE for 5/7/10 seconds (except after teammate death).

solarflair.name: Solar Flair
solarflair.SA2: When activating STAR POWER at full meter, gain permanent HASTE and 3/4/5 stacks of permanent ENRAGE, but suffer FATIGUE for 5 seconds. All effects are removed when exiting STAR POWER.

soulcrusher.name: Soul Crusher
soulcrusher.SA1: Gain DEADEYE and inflict GUARD BREAK for 5/7/10 seconds each whenever the opponent gains a BUFF.
soulcrusher.SA2: Deal 5/7/10% bonus damage for each BUFF or DEBUFF applied to the opponent.

soulssister.name: Souls Sister
soulssister.SA1: Gain 1/2/3% BLOCKBUSTER METER per second while far away from the opponent.
soulssister.SA2: Gain ENRAGE for 5/7/10 seconds when landing a HIT while far away from the opponent.

spacecase.name: Space Case
spacecase.SA1: While RAVENOUS, inflict DOOM for 15 seconds when an opponent's HEALTH drops below 25/35/50%. DOOM is removed if Umbrella TAGS OUT or is defeated.
spacecase.SA2: When defeating an opponent, gain 3 stacks of PRECISION and 3 stacks of a BUFF determined by the opponent's ELEMENT for 10/12/15 seconds.

hacknsplash.name: Hack n' Splash
hacknsplash.SA1: A well-timed BLOCK against standard attacks grants 3/4/5 stacks of PRECISION and inflicts CRIPPLE and ARMOR BREAK for 10 seconds.
hacknsplash.SA2: CRITICAL HITS with Ms. Fortune's HEAD deal an additional 1/2/3% of the opponent's MAX HEALTH if the opponent is suffering from CRIPPLE.

starchild.name: Star Child
starchild.SA1: While in STAR POWER MODE, each HIT blocked by the opponent has a 10% chance to inflict GUARD BREAK and SLOW for 10/12/15 seconds.
starchild.SA2: BLOCKBUSTERS deal 25/35/50% bonus damage while in STAR POWER MODE.

thatsallfolks.name: That's All Folks!
thatsallfolks.SA1: 15% chance when HIT to inflict ARMOR BREAK for 10 seconds and grant 3/4/5 stacks of PRECISION and 1 stack of EVASION.
thatsallfolks.SA2: While Peacock is alive, opponents have 50/60/75% reduced CRIT RATE.

terrorbyte.name: Terror Byte
terrorbyte.SA1: HEADRONE HITS (includes blocked hits) inflict INVERSE POLARITY and DISABLE opponent SPECIAL MOVES for 10/12/15 seconds each.
terrorbyte.SA2: While near an opponent suffering from a DEBUFF, both fighters gain 1/1.5/2% HEALTH per second.

trschic.name: Très Chic
trschic.SA1: While on her own side of the stage, Valentine gains 1 stack of BARRIER, THORNS, or ARMOR every 5/4/3 seconds. These BUFFS are removed when KNOCKED DOWN.
trschic.SA2: While on the opponent's side of the stage, CRITICAL HITS inflict BLEED, DEATH MARK, or ARMOR BREAK for 5/7/10 seconds.

nailbiter.name: Nail Biter
nailbiter.SA1: Gain MIASMA or BARRIER for 15 seconds each every 0.5/0.3/0.25 seconds while charging WYRM'S TAIL. These effects are removed when KNOCKED DOWN.
nailbiter.SA2: While fully CHARGED, EVADE all attacks when DASHING. Successful DASH ATTACKS inflict 1/2/3 random DEBUFFS (excluding STUN or DOOM) for 10 seconds.

treblemaker.name: Treble Maker
treblemaker.SA1: Heal for 5/7/10% of your MAX HEALTH after every 10th COMBO HIT suffered.
treblemaker.SA2: When HIT while above 50% HEALTH, reflect 15/25/35% of the incoming damage.

twistedmettle.name: Twisted Mettle
twistedmettle.SA1: When suffering a CRITICAL HIT, inflict BLEED for 10/12/15 seconds.
twistedmettle.SA2: 25/35/50% chance on HIT to inflict BLEED for 3 seconds if opponent is suffering BLEED.

moodymagus.name: Moody Magus
moodymagus.SA1: Gain a random BUFF for 10/20/30 seconds when defeating an opponent or using a MORTUARY CHARGE.
moodymagus.SA2: Gain 1/1.5/2% BLOCKBUSTER METER per second while benefiting from a BUFF.

tyrannical.name: Tyrannical
tyrannical.SA1: CRITICAL HITS have a 25/30/35% chance to inflict BLEED or grant MIASMA for 6 seconds each.
tyrannical.SA2: While benefiting from at least 3 stacks of MIASMA, or the opponent suffers from at least 3 stacks of BLEED, CRITICAL HITS have a 30/40/50% chance to remove 1 opponent BUFF.

timethief.name: Time Thief
timethief.SA1: When landing a HIT while throwing her head, Ms. Fortune gains HASTE for 10 seconds and deals damage equal to 50/75/100% of her ATTACK.
timethief.SA2: 50/75/100% of the damage suffered while in HEADLESS MODE is regained when Ms. Fortune recalls her head.

templetyrant.name: Temple Tyrant
templetyrant.SA1: When TRANSMUTING to an ELEMENTAL ADVANTAGE, heal for 15/20/25% HEALTH.
templetyrant.SA2: Gain a 25/35/50% chance to CONVERT any DEBUFFS into ARMOR and REGEN for 10 seconds when at an ELEMENTAL ADVANTAGE.

idolecho.name: Idol Echo
idolecho.SA1: Gain 1 random BUFF and inflict 1 random DEBUFF every 3/2/1 second(s) while in a combo. All BUFFS and DEBUFFS are removed at the end of a combo.
idolecho.SA2: Fukua deals 5/7/10% more damage per BUFF applied to her. When Fukua gains 10 or more BUFFS, remove all opponent BUFFS.

toadwarrior.name: Toad Warrior
toadwarrior.SA1: Gain 1/2/3% BLOCKBUSTER METER per second while near an opponent.
toadwarrior.SA2: Deal 25/35/50% bonus damage while a BLOCKBUSTER is fully charged.

triggerhappy.name: Trigger Happy
triggerhappy.SA1: 50/75/100% of the damage dealt by STANDARD SHOTS is also suffered by the opponent's teammates.
triggerhappy.SA2: Gain ENRAGE for 10/12/15 seconds each time the opponent's teammates take damage.

triplethreat.name: Triple Threat
triplethreat.SA1: Gain IMMUNITY, UNFLINCHING, or INVINCIBLE for 9/12/15 seconds when activating STAR POWER. The BUFF is removed when exiting STAR POWER.
triplethreat.SA2: 33% chance when using a SPECIAL MOVE to reset all BUFF timers and gain 20/25/30% STAR POWER meter.

chameleontwist.name: Chameleon Twist
chameleontwist.SA1: Gain MIASMA for 5/7/10 seconds when HITTING an attacking opponent.
chameleontwist.SA2: 5% chance when HIT while a BLOCKBUSTER is charged to gain EVASION and MIASMA for 5/7/10 seconds.

underdog.name: Underdog
underdog.SA1: Gain ARMOR and HASTE for 10/12/15 seconds each when suffering a DEBUFF.
underdog.SA2: When Beowulf gains a BUFF, he also gains 5/7/10% BLOCKBUSTER METER.

understudy.name: Understudy
understudy.SA2: Gain ARMOR for 10/12/15 seconds when THROWING the opponent.

untouchable.name: Untouchable
untouchable.SA1: 15% chance when either Fighter is HIT to gain UNFLINCHING for 4/5/6 seconds and INVINCIBLE for 2 seconds.
untouchable.SA2: While benefiting from UNFLINCHING or INVINCIBLE, deal 25/35/50% bonus damage and regain 25/35/50% of damage inflicted as HEALTH.

ultraviolent.name: Ultraviolent
ultraviolent.SA1: Projectile HITS have a 25/35/50% chance to grant DEADEYE and BARRIER for 15 seconds each.
ultraviolent.SA2: Projectile HITS inflict 25/35/50% bonus damage and grant HASTE for 10 seconds while benefiting from DEADEYE.

unfazed.name: Unfazed
unfazed.SA1: Gain UNFLINCHING and 1/2/3 stack(s) of THORNS for 10 seconds each when either Fighter BOUNCES off a wall.
unfazed.SA2: Gain MIASMA for 10 seconds every 4/3/2 seconds while benefiting from THORNS.

unholyhost.name: Unholy Host
unholyhost.SA1: When Black Dahlia or her opponent TAGS IN, she removes all enemy BUFFS and inflicts CURSE for 10/15/20 seconds.
unholyhost.SA2: DRAIN 1/1.5/2% HEALTH per second from the opponent if they are suffering from CURSE.

vintagevirtuoso.name: Vintage Virtuoso
