vintagevirtuoso.SA1: Gain 1 stack of PRECISION every 20/15/10 COMBO HITS.
vintagevirtuoso.SA2: PRECISION HITS grant ENRAGE and inflict GUARD BREAK for 5/7/10 seconds.

vaporwavevixen.name: Vaporwave Vixen
vaporwavevixen.SA1: After IDLING or WALKING for 3/2/1 second(s) without suffering a hit, gain UNFLINCHING.
vaporwavevixen.SA2: After Fukua and her opponent have not suffered a HIT (includes blocked hits) for 2 seconds, gain THORNS and MIASMA for 5/7/10 seconds.

vectorprotector.name: Vector Protector
vectorprotector.SA1: Gain ARMOR for 5/7/10 seconds when either Fighter uses a SPECIAL MOVE.
vectorprotector.SA2: Using a BLOCKBUSTER converts all ARMOR stacks into MIASMA for 5/7/10 seconds.

wulfsbane.name: Wulfsbane
wulfsbane.SA1: THROWS have a 50% chance to inflict CRIPPLE and HEAL BLOCK for 5/7/10 seconds.
wulfsbane.SA2: Deal 25/35/50% bonus damage against enemies suffering from a DEBUFF.

wildcard.name: Wildcard
wildcard.SA1: Inflict a random DEBUFF for 3/4/5 seconds when using a SPECIAL MOVE.
wildcard.SA2: If the opponent is suffering a DEBUFF when Peacock is defeated, the opponent's HEALTH is reduced by 25/35/50%.

webcrawler.name: Web Crawler
webcrawler.SA1: After Painwheel has been in the air for 1.5 seconds, gain DEADEYE for 10 seconds and inflict GUARD BREAK for 6/7/8 seconds.
webcrawler.SA2: 10/12/15% chance on HIT to remove 1 opponent BUFF and gain EVASION for 10 seconds while near an opponent suffering from GUARD BREAK.

windstalker.name: Wind Stalker
windstalker.SA1: DRAIN 3/4/5% BLOCKBUSTER METER per second while the opponent is near Ms. Fortune's head.
windstalker.SA2: Inflict QUIETUS, DEATHMARK, DISABLE TAG INS, and DOOM for 15 seconds each when an opponent's HEALTH drops below 25/30/35%. DOOM is removed if the opponent uses a BLOCKBUSTER.

windswept.name: Windswept
windswept.SA1: The 1st COMBO HIT against an attacking opponent grants ENRAGE for 5/7/10 seconds and EVASION.
windswept.SA2: After EVADING, 50/75/100% chance to gain PERMANENT PRECISION. PRECISION is removed when either Fighter is KNOCKED DOWN.

weekendwarrior.name: Weekend Warrior
weekendwarrior.SA1: Achieve max HYPE and gain HASTE for 10 seconds when Beowulf first drops below 25/35/50% HEALTH.
weekendwarrior.SA2: When activating HYPE MODE, remove all DEBUFFS and gain IMMUNITY, FINAL STAND, and HEAVY REGEN for 10/12/15 seconds.

wetwork.name: Wetwork
wetwork.SA1: Gain EVASION every 2/1.5/1 second(s) while charging a CHARGE ATTACK.
wetwork.SA2: When knocking an opponent into the air, Valentine gains ENRAGE and the opponent suffers ARMOR BREAK and DEATH MARK for 4/5/7 seconds.

wildchild.name: Wild Child
wildchild.SA1: While not OVERSTUFFED, Umbrella's THROW HITS have a 20% chance to DRAIN 10/12/15% of the opponent's BLOCKBUSTER METER.
wildchild.SA2: Inflict 2 stacks of SLIME for 10/12/15 seconds when the opponent is KNOCKED DOWN.

redrider.name: Red Rider
redrider.SA1: STANDARD SHOTS inflict WITHER and HEAL BLOCK for 10/12/15 seconds each while near an opponent.
redrider.SA2: 25/35/50% of all damage inflicted is regained as HEALTH while the opponent is suffering from HEAL BLOCK.

deathwish.name: Death Wish
deathwish.SA1: Every 7th COMBO HIT landed on Umbrella or the opponent TRANSFERS up to 1/2/3 enemy BUFF(S) to herself and inflicts HEX for 10 seconds.
deathwish.SA2: Once per match when defeated, RESURRECT with 15/20/25% HEALTH and REVIVE all defeated teammates with 25% HEALTH.

wrestlerx.name: Wrestler X
wrestlerx.SA1: Beowulf starts the match with 1/2/3 stacks of permanent REGEN.
wrestlerx.SA2: While in HYPE MODE, all HITS have a 15/20/25% chance to inflict BLEED for 10 seconds.

wunderkind.name: Wunderkind
wunderkind.SA1: 50% chance on BLOCKBUSTER HIT to inflict POWER SURGE and gain BARRIER for 10/12/15 seconds each (also applies on blocked hits).
wunderkind.SA2: While Umbrella is alive, the active fighter DRAINS 3/4/5% of the opponent's HEALTH every 3 seconds while they are suffering from 3 or more stacks of POWER SURGE.

xbot.name: X-Bot
xbot.SA1: Gain PRECISION and inflict DEATH MARK after 3/2/1 second(s) while far away from the opponent.
xbot.SA2: Also gain BARRIER and heal for 3/4/5% HEALTH.

xenomorph.name: Xenomorph
xenomorph.SA1: 50/75/100% chance when TRANSMUTING to the DARK element to inflict a permanent DOOM effect, killing the opponent after 30 seconds. DOOM will be removed if Double is defeated.
xenomorph.SA2: When defeated, inflict 1/2/3 stack(s) of permanent BLEED.

protonpulse.name: Proton Pulse
protonpulse.SA1: 20% chance on HIT to inflict POWER SURGE for 10/15/20 seconds on both fighters while near the opponent. Non-BLOCKBUSTER HITS grant 1/2/3% BLOCKBUSTER METER.
protonpulse.SA2: When using a BLOCKBUSTER, gain ENRAGE, EVASION, or REGEN for 10/15/20 seconds per stack of POWER SURGE on both fighters and remove all POWER SURGE.
